summary: Controlling electron spins in double quantum dots allows individual electrons to be trapped and manipulated for next-generation solid-state qubit devices. In this paper, the study analyzes spin relaxation due to deformation potentials of acoustic phonon in single and double quantum dots under in-plane and out-of-plane magnetic fields, showing that in single quantum dots the relaxation rate is highly sensitive to low in-plane magnetic fields ($<1T$) but converges near a spin-hot-spot region. In a single quantum dot, the spin-hot spot arises from well-understood level crossings between singlet and triplet states. In double quantum dots, a new and unusual spin-hot spot appears as the dots are pulled apart from the origin, with spin-relaxation rates three orders of magnitude lower than conventional single quantum dots. In displaced quantum dots dominated by magnetic confinement, two distinct spin-hot spots appear at different in-plane magnetic field strengths, where spin-relaxation time varies from millisecond to picosecond. When quantum dots are separated by about 60 nm, calculations predict oscillations in spin-hot spots as the in-plane magnetic field changes. These unusual spin-hot spot oscillations occur at low magnetic fields ($<1T$), resulting in spin-relaxation rates about four orders of magnitude lower than those of conventional high-field spin-hot spots ($\approx 4.5T$). The extremely low spin-relaxation rate at the spin-hot spot enables the preparation of qubit superposition states for quantum computing and information processing.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了双量子点中由声子形变势导致的电子自旋弛豫，发现了一种新型自旋热点及其振荡行为，在低磁场下自旋弛豫率比传统热点低四个数量级，为量子计算中的量子比特制备提供了新思路。
AI.motivation: 在双量子点中精确控制电子自旋是实现下一代固态量子比特器件的关键，理解自旋弛豫机制对量子计算至关重要。
AI.method: 理论分析声学声子形变势作用下，单量子点和双量子点中自旋弛豫率随面内/面外磁场的变化规律，重点考察量子点分离距离对自旋热点行为的影响。
AI.result: 单量子点中自旋弛豫率对低面内磁场敏感；双量子点中随间距增大出现新型自旋热点，弛豫率比单量子点低三个数量级；在约60nm分离时，低磁场区出现自旋热点振荡，弛豫率比传统高场热点低约四个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 极低的自旋弛豫率使得在自旋热点区域制备量子比特叠加态成为可能，为量子计算和信息处理提供了新途径。

title: Interface engineering of the anomalous Hall effect in Ni-based heterostructures
summary: Using a combined experimental and first-principles theoretical approach, we demonstrate interface engineering of the anomalous Hall effect in Ni-based epitaxial thin-film heterostructures. Ferromagnetic Ni thin films are grown on (001)-oriented single-crystal LaAlO$_3$, SrTiO$_3$, and MgO substrates, which impose different biaxial tensile strains of 0.3%, 0.6%, and 0.8%, respectively. Our room-temperature Hall transport measurements reveal a pronounced substrate-dependent modulation of the anomalous Hall conductivity. Interestingly, our calculations show that strain alone cannot account for the experimentally observed trends. Instead, we identify interfacial inversion-symmetry breaking, which induces Rashba spin-orbit interaction, as the key mechanism governing the anomalous Hall conductivity across different interfaces. Building on this understanding, we further demonstrate both theoretically and experimentally that the anomalous Hall conductivity can be continuously tuned by an external electric field. These findings establish the critical role of substrate-induced interfacial effects in controlling the anomalous Hall effect in engineered heterostructures and provide a viable pathway toward electrically tunable room-temperature spintronic devices.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验与第一性原理计算结合，展示了在Ni基外延薄膜异质结构中，通过界面工程调控反常霍尔效应。研究发现，界面反演对称性破缺诱导的Rashba自旋轨道耦合是调控反常霍尔电导率的关键机制，而非单纯应变作用，并进一步证明了可通过外加电场连续调控该效应。
AI.motivation: 探究Ni基异质结构中界面对反常霍尔效应的调控机制，特别关注应变与界面反演对称性破缺的相对贡献，并探索电场调控的可行性。
AI.method: 结合实验（在LaAlO₃、SrTiO₃、MgO衬底上生长Ni薄膜并进行室温霍尔输运测量）与第一性原理理论计算。
AI.result: 发现反常霍尔电导率具有显著的衬底依赖性；应变单独无法解释实验趋势；界面反演对称性破缺诱导的Rashba自旋轨道耦合是主导机制；外加电场可连续调控反常霍尔电导率。
AI.conclusion: 确立了衬底诱导的界面效应对反常霍尔效应的关键调控作用，为开发电可调的室温自旋电子学器件提供了可行路径。

title: From bulk to interface dynamics, in and out of equilibrium
summary: We study the dynamics of weakly deformed interfaces separating two stable phases, starting from the fluctuating hydrodynamics of the phase-separating fields. Using a well-chosen definition for the interface and the dynamical-action formalism to represent path probabilities, we derive the linear relaxation of the interface and the fluctuations around it for a large class of models. Our method applies to equilibrium dynamics, where it recovers and complements existing results, but also extends to their non-equilibrium counterparts. We explain how non-linear terms can be systematically computed and illustrate their derivations in the case of (active) model A. We highlight the danger of a popular ansatz used to derive interface dynamics, which was rigorously established in equilibrium but is uncontrolled for active field theories.

AI.tldr: 本文通过涨落流体动力学和动力学作用量形式，系统推导了弱变形相界面的线性弛豫与涨落行为，方法适用于平衡与非平衡体系，并指出活性场论中常用假设的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有相界面动力学理论多集中于平衡态，对非平衡体系（如活性场论）缺乏统一且严格的处理方法。作者希望建立一种普适框架，能够从微观涨落流体动力学出发，系统描述弱变形界面的弛豫与涨落行为，并揭示现有活性场论中常用但未经检验的假设所隐含的危险。
AI.method: 采用合适的界面定义，结合动力学作用量形式（dynamical-action formalism）表示路径概率，从相分离场的涨落流体动力学出发，推导界面线性弛豫与涨落。方法适用于大类型模型，包括平衡动力学（复现并补充现有结果）和非平衡体系。对于非线性项，以（活性）模型A为例展示系统化的计算方法。
AI.result: 成功推导了弱变形相界面的线性弛豫及波动行为的统一表达式；在平衡态复现并完善了已有结果；将理论推广至非平衡情形；指出活性场论中用于推导界面动力学的一个流行假设（在平衡态严格成立但在活性场论中不受控）存在潜在危险。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立的框架为统一描述平衡与非平衡体系中弱变形界面的动力学提供了理论基础，同时警示活性场论中不可轻易沿用平衡态假设，非线性项的系统计算对正确理解活性界面行为至关重要。

title: Free-particle Green's function matrix elements over spherical Gaussian and plane-wave-modulated Gaussian basis functions
summary: Free-particle Green's function plays a central role in the theoretical description of electron scattering and autoionization processes in quantum physics and chemistry. Recently, Gaussian basis set approaches have become increasingly important in applications to unbound and metastable electronic states. However, the practical use of such methods has been limited by the lack of efficient and compact analytical expressions for matrix elements of the free-particle Green's function in Gaussian-based representations. Here we present a novel, general analytical framework for the evaluation of one- and two-center matrix elements of the free-particle Green's function over spherical Gaussian basis functions and plane-wave-modulated spherical Gaussians. The derivation is based on the Fourier transform of Gaussian functions together with the addition theorem of harmonic polynomials, leading to compact closed-form expressions and efficient recurrence relations. We also analyze the asymptotic behavior of the free-particle Green's function matrix elements, which is essential in the description of low-energy continuum electrons using finite Gaussian basis sets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的解析框架，用于高效计算自由粒子格林函数在球高斯基组及平面波调制球高斯基组下的矩阵元，基于傅里叶变换和谐波多项式加法定理，推导出紧凑闭式表达式和递归关系，并分析了其渐近行为。
AI.motivation: 高斯基组方法在描述非束缚和亚稳态电子态中日益重要，但缺乏自由粒子格林函数矩阵元的高效且紧凑的解析表达式，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 基于高斯函数的傅里叶变换，结合谐波多项式的加法定理，推导出单中心和双中心矩阵元的紧凑闭式表达式及高效递归关系。
AI.result: 得到了自由粒子格林函数在球高斯和平面波调制球高斯基组下矩阵元的紧凑闭式表达式和递推关系，并分析了低能连续电子描述中关键的渐近行为。
AI.conclusion: 该解析框架填补了高斯基组方法中自由粒子格林函数矩阵元计算的空白，为电子散射和自电离过程的描述提供了实用工具。

title: Finite-frequency anomaly-induced electromechanical response of Dirac fermions in deformed graphene
summary: A deformation of a graphene sheet changes more than the positions of the atoms. In the low-energy Dirac theory it also produces geometric electron-phonon vertices. One of these vertices acts as an emergent phonon gauge field, $\calA_μ$, which couples to the same Dirac current as the electromagnetic vector potential. This shared current vertex gives a direct route from mechanics to electronics: a moving deformation can generate a transverse electric current, and a deformation pattern with emergent phonon flux can bind electric charge. We show that the coefficient of this mixed electromechanical response is the parity-odd current-current correlator of a massive Dirac cone. For an insulating cone the coefficient is the one-cone Chern-Simons value, while for a doped cone in the local regime it is reduced by the Berry curvature factor $m/|μ|$. We apply the response to explicit deformations. A traveling flexural wave generates a transverse second-harmonic current; a static ripple mixed with a dynamic phonon generates a transverse current at the drive frequency; and two non-collinear modes can generate charge modulation through the emergent phonon flux. We keep the spin and valley sum explicit, so the paper shows when the one-cone anomaly becomes a charge current in graphene and when it instead appears in a valley, spin, or spin-valley channel. For sublattice-gapped graphene with a valley-odd deformation gauge coupling, the two valleys add rather than cancel. The experimentally sharp signature is a transverse electrical signal at twice the flexural-wave frequency, with a phase fixed by the sign of the sublattice gap and a gate dependence that crosses over from a gap plateau to a $1/|μ|$ decay. These direction, phase, frequency, and gate-voltage selection rules give clean tests of the anomaly-induced electromechanical channel in deformed graphene.

AI.tldr: 本文研究石墨烯在变形时产生的几何电子-声子顶点，特别是作为规范场的声子场如何导致机电耦合效应，如横向电流和电荷束缚，并通过异常理论给出实验可观测的信号。
AI.motivation: 揭示石墨烯变形不仅仅是原子位置的变化，在低能Dirac理论中还会产生几何电子-声子顶点，其中一个顶点可作为涌现的声子规范场，耦合到与电磁矢势相同的Dirac流，从而建立力学与电学之间的直接联系。
AI.method: 通过理论分析，计算奇偶性破缺的流-流关联函数，得到混合机电响应的系数；对于绝缘锥，系数为单锥Chern-Simons值；对于掺杂锥，系数被Berry曲率因子 m/|μ| 压低。同时保持自旋和谷指数的显式求和。
AI.result: 展示了几种具体变形下的电响应：行波弯曲波产生横向二次谐波电流；静态波纹与动态声子混合产生驱动频率下的横向电流；两个非共线模式可通过涌现声子通量产生电荷调制。对于子晶格带隙石墨烯，两个谷的贡献相加而非相消。
AI.conclusion: 实验上可观测的信号是弯曲波频率两倍的横向电信号，其相位由子晶格带隙符号决定，栅压依赖性从带隙平台到 1/|μ| 衰减。这些方向、相位、频率和栅压选择定则为验证石墨烯中异常诱导的机电通道提供了干净测试。

title: Enhancement of superconductivity by polarization of magnetic impurities in disordered films
summary: Dirty superconducting films with magnetic impurities can exhibit nontrivial behavior in a magnetic field that polarizes the impurity spins. As predicted by Kharitonov and Feigelman (KF) [JETP Lett. 82, 421 (2005)], this polarization reduces the exchange scattering rate. Consequently, a parallel magnetic field can enhance the critical temperature $T_c$ when magnetic-field pair breaking is weak, as realized for strong spin-orbit scattering and small film thickness. Recently, Llanos et al. [Nat. Phys. (2026)] observed a pronounced enhancement of $T_c$ consistent with the KF theory. The same experiment also reported an enhancement of the perpendicular upper critical field $H_{c2}^{\perp}$ and a suppression of the London penetration depth $λ_L$ by a parallel magnetic field. These quantities were not considered in the original KF theory. To address this gap, we develop a theoretical framework based on Gor'kov's diagrammatic technique for dirty superconductors. We extend the KF theory in two experimentally relevant directions: (i) to arbitrary temperatures $T<T_c$ and several superconducting observables, and (ii) to arbitrary magnetic-field orientations. As a result, we demonstrate theoretically the suppression of $λ_L$ and the enhancement of $H_{c2}^{\perp}$ by a parallel magnetic field, in agreement with experiment.

AI.tldr: 本文扩展了Kharitonov-Feigelman理论，建立了描述平行磁场对无序超导薄膜中临界温度、上临界场和伦敦穿透深度影响的完整理论框架，成功解释了Llanos等人最近的实验观测。
AI.motivation: 现有KF理论仅关注平行磁场对临界温度Tc的增强效应，但最近实验还观察到平行磁场增强了垂直上临界场Hc2⊥并抑制了伦敦穿透深度λL，这些现象未被原有理论解释。
AI.method: 基于Gor'kov图技术发展出适用于脏超导体的理论框架，将KF理论扩展到任意温度T<Tc及多种超导可观测量，并推广到任意磁场取向。
AI.result: 从理论上证明了平行磁场会抑制伦敦穿透深度λL并增强垂直上临界场Hc2⊥，与实验观测一致。
AI.conclusion: 该理论成功填补了KF理论的空白，为理解磁性杂质污染的脏超导薄膜在磁场中的行为提供了更完整的描述。

title: Observation of a Mott quantum spin Hall insulator in twisted WSe2
summary: Quantum spin Hall (QSH) insulators and Mott insulators are conventionally regarded as distinct insulating phases, arising from band topology and strong Coulomb interactions, respectively. Here, we report the observation of QSH edge transport in a magnetic-field-stabilized Mott insulating state at half filling of the second moire band in a 2.29 degree twisted WSe2 device. This state exhibits a resistance plateau identical to that of the single-particle QSH state at full filling of the first moire valence band, indicating the same number of helical edge channels. Electrical transport measurements reveal nearly quantized resistance that is insensitive to vertical electric field, out-of-plane magnetic field, and temperature below 5 K. Pronounced nonlocal transport and strong negative in-plane magnetoconductance further support helical edge conduction, establishing robust edge transport in the strongly correlated regime. Temperature-dependent Hall measurements reveal a characteristic temperature scale of approximately 10 K, corresponding to an energy scale of about 1 meV. Our results demonstrate that spin-conserved QSH edge states can persist in a half filled, strongly correlated insulating phase and under external magnetic field, opening a route toward interaction-resilient topological transport in moire quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 本文报道在2.29度扭转WSe2器件的第二莫尔能带半填充处，观察到磁场稳定的莫特绝缘态中存在量子自旋霍尔（QSH）边缘输运，表现出与第一莫尔价带全填充单粒子QSH态相同的电阻平台，证明强关联体系中拓扑边缘态可以存在。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为QSH绝缘体（能带拓扑）和莫特绝缘体（强库仑相互作用）是截然不同的绝缘相，作者希望探索在强关联体系中是否仍能存在QSH边缘态，突破这一传统认知。
AI.method: 采用2.29度扭转WSe2器件，在第二莫尔能带半填充处通过磁场稳定莫特绝缘态，进行电阻平台测量、电场/磁场/温度依赖性测试、非局域输运测量、面内负磁导测量以及霍尔效应温度依赖性测量。
AI.result: 观测到的电阻平台与单粒子QSH态相同；边缘输运对垂直电场、面外磁场和5K以下温度不敏感；存在显著的非局域输运和强负的面内磁导；霍尔测量显示特征温度约10K对应能量约1meV。
AI.conclusion: 自旋守恒的QSH边缘态可以在半填充的强关联绝缘相以及外加磁场下存在，为实现莫尔量子材料中抗相互作用的拓扑输运开辟了新路径。

title: An Efficient Approach for Calculating Free Energy in Molecular Dynamics: Demineralization of Hydroxyapatite as a Case Study
summary: Despite the strength of Molecular Dynamics simulations in providing insights into the microscopic details of phenomenon in many fields in materials science, physics and biology, the biggest barrier is its limited timescale which is several orders of magnitude lower than the timescale of the real-world processes and phenomena being modeled. Free energy calculations are designed as a remedy to this problem that in theory can overcome this barrier. This is particularly relevant for biomineralisation processes such as tooth mineral formation and dissolution, while reflecting a broader challenge in accurately modelling rare events and long-timescale phenomena across complex molecular systems. However, due to the novelty of the field, a number of questions remain outstanding pertaining to the best practice of applying this method. The non-equilibrium work approach based on the Jarzynski equation is one of the most promising free energy calculation methods. However, the biggest challenge for the broader use of this method is the question of how many simulations are required for an accurate free energy estimation. Comparing the free energy results with very long reversible pulling simulations of atom clusters from the surface, each taking 75 days on the 48-core Intel Xeon Platinum 8268 CPUs, in this study we showed that this question is irrelevant and higher quality and better equilibrated initial structures is the proper approach than simply based on the number of simulations. We designed a new adaptive free energy calculation methodology which combines high quality, high computational cost free energy values with lower quality, lower cost values to build up the entire free energy profile. In the best case scenario this method lowers manifold the computational cost required for the non-equilibrium work free energy calculations compared to both the regular method and the reversible simulation.

AI.tldr: 本文针对分子动力学模拟时间尺度受限的问题，提出了一种新的自适应非平衡功自由能计算方法，通过结合高质量高成本和低质量低成本自由能值来构建完整自由能曲线，证明初始结构质量比模拟次数更关键，并在最佳情况下显著降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 分子动力学模拟的时间尺度远低于真实过程，自由能计算是解决这一瓶颈的关键方法，但在生物矿化等稀有事件建模中，非平衡功方法（基于Jarzynski方程）存在"需要多少次模拟才能获得准确结果"这一核心未决问题，亟需明确。
AI.method: 以超长可逆拉动模拟（48核CPU上75天）为基准，对比不同数量模拟的非平衡功自由能计算结果；设计自适应方法，将高成本高质量自由能值与低成本低质量值相结合，逐步构建完整自由能曲线。
AI.result: 发现模拟数量并非准确性的关键，初始结构质量和平衡程度才是决定性因素；新自适应方法在最佳情况下比常规非平衡功方法和可逆模拟均大幅降低计算成本。
AI.conclusion: 非平衡功自由能计算的实践中，应优先关注初始结构的质量和平衡化，而非盲目增加模拟次数；自适应方法为高效计算自由能曲线提供了可行途径。

title: Data-driven analysis of metastability in a stochastic bistable system
summary: We study the metastability properties of a simple prototypical bistable system using the formalism of the Koopman operator. Instead of studying noise-induced transitions by following the trajectories of the system, we track them by studying the time evolution and the decay rate of the subdominant mode of the Koopman operator, thus in a geometry-agnostic framework. We find agreement with the predictions - both the exponential and subexponential ones - of large deviation theory in the weak-noise limit for the statistics of escape time, both in equilibrium and nonequilibrium conditions. The subdominant Koopman mode also allows for an accurate reconstruction of the competing basins of attraction. Going deeper in the Koopman spectrum, we are able to recognise modes that are associated with intrawell variability as well as with the escape of trajectories from the saddle towards the attractor, both in the equilibrium and nonequilibrium case. Our methodology, being grounded in purely data-driven techniques, could be helpful for studying high-dimensional metastable systems.

AI.tldr: 本文利用Koopman算子形式化框架研究双稳系统的亚稳态性质，通过跟踪子主导Koopman模式的时间演化和衰减率来分析噪声诱导的跃迁，验证了大偏差理论在弱噪声极限下的逃逸时间统计，并展示了该方法在盆吸引子重建和谱分析方面的能力。
AI.motivation: 传统研究噪声诱导跃迁需要追踪系统轨迹，受限于几何结构。本文希望发展一种几何无关的框架，利用Koopman算子来研究亚稳态系统的逃逸行为，并验证其与大偏差理论的一致性。
AI.method: 采用Koopman算子形式化框架，通过跟踪子主导Koopman模式的时间演化和衰减率来研究噪声诱导的跃迁，结合纯数据驱动技术进行分析，并与大偏差理论预测（指数和次指数）进行对比。
AI.result: 在平衡和非平衡条件下，在弱噪声极限下逃逸时间统计与大偏差理论预测（包括指数和次指数）一致；子主导Koopman模式能准确重建竞争的盆吸引子；更深层Koopman谱中识别出与阱内变异性及鞍点向吸引子逃逸轨迹相关的模式。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的纯数据驱动方法可推广到高维亚稳态系统的研究，为理解复杂系统的亚稳态行为提供了几何无关的有效工具。

title: Graph-Theoretic Detection of Hilbert Space Fragmentation
summary: Hilbert-space fragmentation provides a mechanism for ergodicity breaking in quantum many-body systems even in the absence of disorder, leading to dynamically disconnected sectors and strong memory of initial conditions. However, identifying such structures is often challenging and typically relies on prior knowledge of conservation laws or model-specific analytical insight. Here we introduce an unbiased approach based on spectral graph theory and, within this framework, formulate the concept of nearly fragmented systems, in which perturbative processes couple otherwise fragmented sectors while preserving their dynamical imprint. By representing basis states as vertices and Hamiltonian matrix elements as edges, we map the connectivity structure of the many-body Hilbert space onto a graph and analyze it using tools such as the Laplacian spectrum, Fiedler vectors, and modularity. Exact fragmentation corresponds to disconnected graph components, while nearly fragmented systems manifest as weakly connected communities whose structure can still be resolved spectrally. Applying this framework to the one-dimensional $t$-$J$ model and its perturbations, we demonstrate that graph-theoretic diagnostics reliably identify both fragmented and nearly fragmented Hilbert-space structures and capture the hierarchy of dynamical time scales that governs the system's evolution. We further show that the method extends beyond kinetically constrained models by applying it directly to the Hubbard chain, where it reveals the emergence of nearly decoupled subspaces associated with doublon dynamics and spin configurations. Our results establish the spectral graph analysis as a general and scalable tool for diagnosing fragmentation and approximate dynamical constraints in complex quantum many-body systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于谱图理论的无偏方法，用于诊断量子多体系统中的希尔伯特空间碎裂现象，并通过图拉普拉斯谱、Fiedler向量和模块度等工具，识别精确碎裂与近似碎裂结构。在一维t-J模型和Hubbard链上的应用展示了该方法的普适性和可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 希尔伯特空间碎裂导致量子多体系统在无无序条件下也能打破遍历性，但现有方法通常依赖于先验守恒律或模型特定的解析知识，缺乏一种通用、无偏的诊断工具。
AI.method: 将希尔伯特空间中的基态视为图顶点，哈密顿量矩阵元视为边，构建状态空间对应的图结构；利用拉普拉斯谱、Fiedler向量和模块度等谱图理论工具，分析图的连通性，区分精确碎裂（不连通分量）和近似碎裂（弱连接社区）。
AI.result: 在一维t-J模型及其微扰中，图论诊断方法成功识别了碎裂与近似碎裂结构，并捕捉到了系统演化的动力学时间尺度层级。在Hubbard链中，揭示了与双子动力学和自旋构型相关的近似解耦子空间。
AI.conclusion: 谱图分析方法是一种通用且可扩展的工具，适用于诊断复杂量子多体系统中的碎裂与近似动力学约束。

title: Enhanced $s^\pm$-wave superconductivity in electron-doped La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$
summary: In cuprates, electron doping yields a much lower superconducting $T_c$ than hole doping. For recently discovered nickelate superconductors, the analogous doping strategies become more challenging. Consequently, while hole-doped Ruddlesden-Popper (RP) nickelates have been extensively studied, electron-doped RP nickelates remain rarely explored both experimentally and theoretically. Here we fill this gap by systematically investigating the two-orbital bilayer model for three representative systems: bulk La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ at ambient pressure and 15\,GPa, and a heterostructure La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$:La$_3$Al$_2$O$_7$ that provides a feasible experimental route to electron doping. Using first-principle calculations and large-scale dynamical cluster quantum Monte Carlo simulations, we find that electron doping generically enhances $s^\pm$-wave pairing superconductivity (SC) in all three cases, with the heterostructure showing the highest $T_c$ in the underdoped regime. Furthermore, our results suggest an inter-orbital cooperative mechanism that the pairing on the $d_{x^2-y^2}$ orbital, induced by that on the $d_{z^2}$ orbital, plays vital role in the SC. This work provides the first theoretical prediction of enhanced SC in electron-doped RP nickelates and calls for future experimental verification.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算和量子蒙特卡洛模拟，系统研究了电子掺杂对三层镍酸盐超导体的影响，发现电子掺杂普遍增强s±波配对超导性，并提出了轨道间协同配对机制。其中异质结La₃Ni₂O₇:La₃Al₂O₇在欠掺杂区展现出最高的超导转变温度。
AI.motivation: 铜氧化物中电子掺杂的超导转变温度远低于空穴掺杂，而镍基超导体的掺杂研究更具挑战性。目前空穴掺杂的Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐已被广泛研究，但电子掺杂体系在实验和理论上都几乎空白，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算和大规模动力学团簇量子蒙特卡洛模拟，研究了三个代表性体系：常压和15GPa下的La₃Ni₂O₇块材，以及La₃Ni₂O₇:La₃Al₂O₇异质结。对双轨道双层模型进行系统分析。
AI.result: 电子掺杂在三种体系中均增强s±波配对超导性，异质结在欠掺杂区具有最高的Tc。发现了一种轨道间协同机制：d_{z^2}轨道上的配对诱导d_{x^2-y^2}轨道上的配对，对超导起关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 首次从理论上预测电子掺杂能增强RP镍酸盐的超导性，提出了轨道间协同配对机制，呼吁未来实验验证。

title: Durable Enhancement of $\mathbf{MoS_2}$ Single-Layer Photoluminescence by Ultraviolet Laser Treatment Under Ambient Conditions
summary: Single-layer molybdenum disulfide ($MoS_2$) possesses significant potential for nanoscale optoelectronics, but achieving high-intensity, long-term-stable photoluminescence (PL) emission remains a challenge. In this work, we demonstrate a remarkably robust, more than 8-fold maximum enhancement in the PL intensity of exfoliated and CVD-grown single-layer $MoS_2$ via a non-destructive ultraviolet (UV) laser treatment method. This substantial increase in radiative efficiency is accompanied by a trion-to-neutral exciton transition in the PL signal and a corresponding blue shift of the Raman $E_{2g}^1$ and $A_{1g}$ vibrational modes, signaling successful electron depletion (p-doping) and formation of Mo-O bonds, respectively. Furthermore, we demonstrate precise spatial control over PL properties by confining PL treatment exclusively to the UV laser-treated area. Crucially, the enhanced PL performance shows exceptional longevity; the CVD sample and the exfoliated sample remained stable for the entire monitoring period (72 and 32 days, respectively) under ambient conditions. We further investigated UV laser treatment in a controlled-environment chamber under argon, nitrogen, and oxygen atmospheres, distinguishing the influence of oxygen as the PL treatment agent. These findings establish a reliable pathway for the permanent treatment of single-layer $MoS_2$ PL properties, an essential step toward practical, high-performance nanophotonic devices.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种非破坏性紫外激光处理方法，使单层MoS₂的光致发光强度提高8倍以上，并实现了从三子到中性激子的转变，且增强效果在环境条件下可持续超过72天。
AI.motivation: 单层MoS₂在纳米光电子学中潜力巨大，但其PL发射强度低、稳定性差的问题阻碍了实际应用，亟需一种高效、持久且非破坏性的增强方法。
AI.method: 采用紫外激光对剥离法和CVD生长的单层MoS₂进行非破坏性处理，并通过控制气氛（Ar、N₂、O₂）实验确认氧是PL处理的关键介质。利用拉曼光谱和PL光谱分析处理前后的电子结构变化。
AI.result: PL强度最大增强8倍以上，伴随三子到中性激子跃迁、拉曼模式蓝移；CVD样品稳定72天、剥离样品稳定32天；空间上可精确控制PL增强区域，确认氧是活性处理剂。
AI.conclusion: 紫外激光辅助氧化是实现单层MoS₂永久性PL增强的可靠路径，为高性能纳米光子器件的实用化提供了关键步骤。

title: First-principles calculations of electrical conductivities of edge-modified graphene nanoribbons: strain effect
summary: We investigate the influence of strain on the electrical properties of graphene nanoribbons that have potential applications in making sensors and other optoelectronic devices. In particular, we chose pristine armchair graphene nanoribbons with 7 zigzag edges (7aGNRsH), boron doped armchair graphene nanoribbons with 7 zigzag edges (7aGNRsH-B) and armchair graphene nanoribbons with 7 zigzag edges that have one carbon atom vacancy (7aGNRsH-V). Based on first-principles calculations, results show that pristine unstrained 7aGNRsH is electrically nonconductive but turns to be electrically conductive in a wide range of energy spectrum, e.g., from IR to visible to UV, due to the application of strain engineering. In metallic unstrained and strained 7aGNRsH-B and 7aGNRsH-V, non-vanishing electrical conductivity in the IR, visible and UV energy spectrum regimes are observed. We also investigate the influence of strain on the Berry curvature of 7aGNRsH, 7aGNRsH-B and 7aGNRsH-V nanoribbons. The results show that fermions are spread through out the Brillion zone in the reciprocal space for semiconducting unstrained 7aGNRsH but localized near the $Γ$-point for strained 7aGNRsH that have out-of-plane deformations due to strain engineering. For metallics 7aGNRsH-B and 7aGNRsH-V, Berry curvature plots show that fermions are localized far away from the $Γ$-point. In two atom boron doped p-type armchair graphene nanoribbons with 7 zigzag edges (7aGNRsH-2B), large peaks in electrical conductivity at IR energy spectrum regimes can be observed. These peaks of electrical conductivities in 7aGNRSH-2B may be detectable in experimentally synthesized structure in Reference, JACS 137, 8872 (2016).

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算，研究了应变对三种7-zigzag边缘扶手椅石墨烯纳米带（纯净、硼掺杂、碳空位）电学性质的影响，发现应变可使半导体性纳米带转变为导体，并分析了贝里曲率与费米子分布的变化。
AI.motivation: 探究应变工程对石墨烯纳米带电学性质的调控机制，为其在传感器和光电器件中的应用提供理论依据。
AI.method: 基于第一性原理计算，对三种7aGNRsH体系（纯净、硼掺杂、碳空位）施加应变，计算其电导率及贝里曲率，分析能谱范围（IR到UV）内的电学行为变化。
AI.result: 纯净未应变7aGNRsH不导电，应变后可在IR至UV宽谱范围内导电；硼掺杂和碳空位体系在应变前后均表现出金属导电性；应变使纯净体系的费米子从遍布布里渊区变为局域在Γ点附近；双硼掺杂体系在IR波段出现可探测的电导率峰值。
AI.conclusion: 应变工程可有效调控石墨烯纳米带的电学性质，实现从半导体到导体的转变，为设计高性能纳米光电器件提供可行方案。

title: Euler-Maruyama method for non-Wiener processes
summary: Descriptions of complex physical or biological systems often include stochastic contributions, and these are commonly simulated using Wiener processes. In many cases however, non-Gaussian fluctuations may originate from non-Wiener processes which remain less explored. The Euler-Maruyama method of discretising stochastic differential equations to non-Wiener processes is generalised. Non-Gaussian noise generated from a subset of Lévy processes can be used simply and often with more physical justification, for both additive and multiplicative noise. An example of this is provided that gives superior physical results compared to using geometric Brownian motion. Finally the results of the additive noise are shown to be equivalent to a derived master equation via the Kramers-Moyal expansion.

AI.tldr: 本文推广了Euler-Maruyama方法至非Wiener过程（Lévy过程），用于模拟非高斯噪声，并在加性和乘性噪声场景中提供了比几何布朗运动更优的物理结果，同时通过Kramers-Moyal展开证明了与主方程的等价性。
AI.motivation: 复杂物理/生物系统的描述常包含随机贡献，通常用Wiener过程模拟，但实际中非高斯波动可能源自非Wiener过程，而这类过程研究较少，因此需要推广方法。
AI.method: 将Euler-Maruyama离散化方法从Wiener过程推广到非Wiener过程（Lévy过程子集），适用于加性和乘性噪声。
AI.result: 非高斯噪声（Lévy过程）比几何布朗运动在物理上更合理，加性噪声结果通过Kramers-Moyal展开与主方程等价。
AI.conclusion: 推广后的方法可用于更真实地模拟非高斯随机过程，具有物理合理性，且加性噪声情况与主方程理论一致。

title: Structure of Molten FeCl2 and FeCl3
comment: 26 total pages, 11 main figures, 6 supplementary figures
summary: Molten iron chlorides are central to emerging energy technologies, including electrochemical iron production and redox flow batteries. Optimizing their electrochemical performance and transport properties requires atomic-scale structural understanding, yet detailed data for molten FeCl2 and its differences from FeCl3 remain scarce. Here, we determined the structures of molten FeCl2 and FeCl3 using High Energy X-ray diffraction (HEXRD), Empirical Potential Structure Refinement (EPSR), and molecular dynamics (MD) simulations with machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs). HEXRD measurements provided structure factors and total radial distribution functions (RDFs), which were quantitatively reproduced through EPSR refinement directly constrained by experimental data. MD simulations using MACE foundation and fine-tuned models reproduced experimental structure factors as well as total and partial RDFs, capturing key structural differences between the melts. The models resolved the octahedral to tetrahedral coordination transition of Fe upon melting in FeCl3 and predicted a similar transition in FeCl2. Analysis of MD trajectories quantified coordination environments, bridging Cl populations, bond-angle distributions, and connectivity patterns, revealing distinct degrees of polymerization and local geometry. Polymer chain statistics further showed that, contrary to prior reports, both liquids predominantly consist of extended chains containing six or more Fe centers rather than discrete Fe2Cl6 units. Finally, diffusion coefficients of the two melts calculated from the MACE-MD simulations were compared. Together, these results establish atomic-scale structural benchmarks for molten FeCl2 and FeCl3 and demonstrate the reliability of MACE-based MLIPs for predictive modeling of high-temperature molten salts, while providing practical guidance for MLIP development in complex ionic liquids.

AI.tldr: 本文利用高能X射线衍射、经验势结构精修和基于机器学习的分子动力学模拟，揭示了熔融FeCl2和FeCl3的原子尺度结构差异，发现两者主要由含六个以上Fe原子的长链组成而非离散的Fe2Cl6单元，并建立了高温熔盐结构的基准参考。
AI.motivation: 熔融铁氯化物在电化学制铁和氧化还原液流电池等新兴能源技术中至关重要，优化其电化学性能和输运性质需要原子尺度的结构理解，然而目前关于熔融FeCl2及其与FeCl3差异的详细结构数据十分匮乏。
AI.method: 结合高能X射线衍射实验、经验势结构精修（EPSR）以及使用机器学习原子间势（MACE）的分子动力学模拟，对熔融FeCl2和FeCl3进行结构和性质分析。
AI.result: 定量再现了实验结构因子和径向分布函数；解析了FeCl3熔融时八面体到四面体配位的转变，并预测了FeCl2也存在类似转变；发现两种熔体主要由含六个以上Fe原子的延伸链组成，而非此前报道的离散Fe2Cl6单元；计算并比较了两者的扩散系数。
AI.conclusion: 建立了熔融FeCl2和FeCl3的原子级结构基准，验证了MACE-MLIP在高温熔盐预测建模中的可靠性，并为复杂离子液体中MLIP的发展提供了实用指导。

title: $5/9-$Magnetization Plateau and Spin Supersolidity in YCu$_3$(OD)$_{7-x}$Br$_{2+x}$ under Magnetic Fields up to 120~T
summary: We performed high-precision magnetization measurements up to 120~T on three compositions of the newly discovered kagome antiferromagnet YCu$_3$(OD)$_{7-x}$Br$_{2+x}$ (YCOB), revealing a previously unobserved 5/9 fractional magnetization plateau. All YCOB samples with different Br$^-$ concentrations exhibit nearly identical magnetization curves below 60~T, whereas the 5/9 plateau appears at markedly different fields in the ultrahigh-field regime. By modeling the experimental data using tensor-network calculations, we derive the effective spin Hamiltonians for the YCOB family with three spatially anisotropic Heisenberg couplings (the 3$J$-type model), which quantitatively reproduces the measured magnetization processes and captures the composition-dependent evolution of the 5/9 plateau. Furthermore, our theoretical analysis suggests the emergence of a spin supersolid phase in the field window between the 1/3 and 5/9 plateaus, which is sensitive to spin exchange parameters and accounts for the significant variation in the critical fields of the 5/9 plateau observed among different YCOB compositions.

AI.tldr: 本文通过高精度磁化测量在120 T强磁场下，在新型kagome反铁磁体YCu₃(OD)₇₋ₓBr₂₊ₓ（YCOB）中发现了此前未观察到的5/9分数磁化平台，并结合张量网络计算构建了有效自旋哈密顿量（3J型模型），定量重现了磁化过程并揭示了组分依赖的5/9平台演化，理论分析还预测了在1/3与5/9平台之间存在对自旋交换参数敏感的自旋超固态相。
AI.motivation: 探索新型kagome反铁磁体YCOB中可能存在的高阶分数磁化平台及背后的量子自旋物态。
AI.method: 对三种不同Br⁻浓度的YCOB样品进行最高120 T的高精度磁化测量，并利用张量网络计算进行理论建模，推导包含三个空间各向异性海森堡耦合的3J型有效自旋哈密顿量。
AI.result: 在YCOB中首次观测到5/9分数磁化平台；不同Br⁻浓度的样品在60 T以下磁化曲线几乎一致，但5/9平台出现在显著不同的超强磁场区间；理论模型定量重现了实验磁化过程及5/9平台的组分演化。
AI.conclusion: YCOB家族存在5/9分数磁化平台，且其临界场对组分敏感；理论预测在1/3与5/9平台之间存在自旋超固态相，该相依赖于自旋交换参数。

title: Competition and coexistence of superconducting symmetries in $p$-wave magnets
summary: We investigate the interplay between unconventional magnetism and superconductivity in a model of a $p$-wave magnet on a square lattice. Using a self-consistent Bogoliubov-de-Gennes approach, we analyze the pairing amplitudes, competition, and coexistence of spin-singlet $s$-wave and spin-triplet $p$-wave pairings in the presence of a magnetic texture with a helical structure along the $x$ direction that is repeated in the $y$ direction. We find that the magnetic helix selectively stabilizes different pairing symmetries depending on its orientation and strength. In particular, mixed-spin $p_x$-wave pairing is enhanced at intermediate magnetic couplings and equal-spin $p_y$-wave pairing is robust and insensitive to all coupling intensities. When the multiple order parameters are simultaneously considered, we find regimes of coexistence and competition. Increasing the magnetic coupling drives two quantum phase transitions. The first from dominant spin-singlet $s$-wave to mixed-spin triplet $p_x$-wave pairings in a regime of coexistence. The second from spin-singlet $s$-wave and mixed-spin triplet $p$-wave pairings with total spin projection $S_z=0$ to dominant equal-spin triplet $p_y$-wave pairings with $S_z=\pm1$ in a regime of mutually exclusive superconducting phases. Our results demonstrate that $p$-wave magnetic order does not merely diminish spin-singlet $s$-wave superconductivity but can actively promote and stabilize spin-triplet $p$-wave pairing, both intrinsically and in proximity to spin-singlet $s$-wave superconductors. These findings highlight unconventional magnets as promising materials for realizing robust triplet superconductivity.

AI.tldr: 本文通过自洽Bogoliubov-de-Gennes方法研究了$p$波磁体（螺旋磁结构）与超导的相互作用，发现磁螺旋结构能选择性地稳定不同配对对称性，尤其是增强了混合自旋$p_x$波和等自旋$p_y$波配对，并驱动了两次量子相变，表明$p$波磁有序不仅能抑制$s$波超导，还能主动促进和稳定$p$波三重态超导。
AI.motivation: 探究$p$波磁体中的非传统磁性与超导电性之间的相互作用机制，特别是磁螺旋结构如何影响自旋单态$s$波与自旋三重态$p$波配对的竞争与共存。
AI.method: 在正方晶格上构建$p$波磁体模型（沿$x$方向螺旋、$y$方向重复的磁织构），采用自洽Bogoliubov-de-Gennes方法分析配对振幅、竞争与共存。
AI.result: 磁螺旋的中等耦合增强混合自旋$p_x$波配对；等自旋$p_y$波配对对所有耦合强度均稳健；增大磁耦合驱动两次量子相变：首先从$s$波主导→$p_x$波主导（共存区），然后从$S_z=0$的$s$+$p$波→$S_z=\pm1$的$p_y$波主导（互斥区）。
AI.conclusion: $p$波磁有序可主动促进并稳定自旋三重态$p$波超导，非传统磁体是实现稳健三重态超导的有前景材料。

title: Geometry-Driven Nonlinear Orbital Magnetoelectric Effect
summary: We propose a nonlinear orbital magnetoelectric effect, which generates orbital magnetization quadratically in centrosymmetric materials where the linear orbital magnetoelectric effect is strictly forbidden. Using extended semiclassical formulation, we derive a gauge-invariant microscopic theory that separates intrinsic and extrinsic contributions and establishes their distinct dependence on the relaxation time, providing an experimental discriminator. In two-dimensional systems the nonlinear response is far less constrained by out-of-plane rotational symmetries than the linear orbital magnetoelectric effect, substantially enlarging the materials platform. Microscopically, the dominant contributions are governed by a Hermitian-connection structure. Finally, we estimate that the magnitude of the nonlinear orbital magnetoelectric effect lies within the sensitivity of state-of-the-art magneto-optical Kerr measurements.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种非线性轨道磁电效应，可在中心对称材料中二次产生轨道磁化，扩展了材料平台，并推导了规范不变的微观理论，估计其幅度可被当前磁光克尔测量技术探测。
AI.motivation: 线性轨道磁电效应在中心对称材料中被严格禁止，因此需要探索非线性效应以在更广泛的材料体系中实现轨道磁电耦合。
AI.method: 采用扩展半经典形式体系，推导出规范不变的微观理论，将内在贡献与外在贡献分离，并建立它们对弛豫时间的不同依赖关系。
AI.result: 非线性响应在二维系统中受面外旋转对称性的约束远小于线性效应，显著扩展了材料平台；主要贡献由厄密联络结构主导；效应幅度处于当前磁光克尔测量的灵敏度范围内。
AI.conclusion: 非线性轨道磁电效应为中心对称材料中轨道磁电耦合的研究提供了新途径，且具有实验可探测性。

title: Spatial statistics for screening molecular structures
summary: The dominant paradigm in computational materials discovery relies on heavily parameterized deep architectures, including message-passing graph networks and equivariant models, that require millions of DFT-labeled training structures and produce non-convex latent representations that complicate continuous optimization for inverse design. These architectures are impractical in data-scarce regimes, which is the typical case in molecular screening, and exhibit well-documented limitations in capturing chemically disordered configurations and chiral geometries. This review presents feature engineering based on spatial statistics as a physically rigorous and immediately deployable alternative. Molecular structures are encoded as voxelized scalar fields, and two-point auto- and cross-correlations are evaluated deterministically via Fast Fourier Transforms, explicitly transferring the burden of spatial pattern recognition from the learning algorithm to a closed-form, physics-informed operation. Principal component analysis of the resulting correlation maps yields low-dimensional, strictly convex representations that support lean neural networks (<100k trainable parameters) and non-parametric surrogate models, achieving sub-2% prediction error with as few as 10 training samples. Demonstrated across periodic crystals, chemically disordered high-entropy alloys, and non-periodic organic molecules, this framework enables Bayesian active learning and zero-shot extrapolation on commodity hardware, which current large-scale architectures cannot replicate at equivalent data budgets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于空间统计学的特征工程方法，通过傅里叶变换计算两点相关性，替代高参数化深度学习架构，在少样本条件下实现高精度材料性质预测。
AI.motivation: 当前基于深度学习的材料发现方法（如消息传递图网络、等变模型）需要大量DFT标记训练数据，且产生非凸隐式表征，不利于逆向设计的连续优化，在数据稀缺场景（分子筛选的典型情况）下不实用，也无法有效处理化学无序构型和手性几何。
AI.method: 将分子结构编码为体素化标量场，通过快速傅里叶变换（FFT）确定性计算两点自相关和互相关函数，将空间模式识别的负担从学习算法转移到闭合形式的物理信息操作。对相关图进行主成分分析（PCA），得到低维严格凸表征，支持轻量级神经网络（<10万参数）和非参数代理模型。
AI.result: 少至10个训练样本即可实现低于2%的预测误差。在周期晶体、化学无序高熵合金和非周期有机分子上均得到验证。支持贝叶斯主动学习和零样本外推，在同等数据预算下，当前大规模架构无法复现。
AI.conclusion: 基于空间统计学的特征工程是深度学习架构在数据稀缺场景下的物理可解释、可立即部署的替代方案，在轻量级计算资源上即可实现高效的材料性质预测与逆向设计。

title: Percolation transition of strongly connected clusters in finite dimensions and on complete graphs
summary: We study the percolation of strongly connected clusters (SCCs), in which sites are mutually reachable through directed paths, in systems with randomly oriented bonds by extensive simulations on hypercubic lattices from dimension $d=2$ to $7$ and complete graphs. Below the upper critical dimension $d_u=6$, the critical SCCs exhibit nontrivial fractal dimension $d_{\rm SCC}$, and the size distribution scales as $\sim s^{-τ_{\rm SCC}}$ with the hyperscaling relation $τ_{\rm SCC}=1+d/d_{\rm SCC}$. For $d \ge d_u$, mean-field behavior is recovered with $d_{\rm SCC}/d=1/3$, consistent with complete-graph results. However, in contrast to hypercubic lattices, complete graphs exhibit a double-scaling structure in the SCC size distribution: large SCCs are governed by mean-field value $τ_{\rm SCC}=4$, while small SCCs follow a distinct power law with exponent $τ'=1$. At criticality, the giant in- and out-clusters are also fractal, sharing the same dimension as standard percolation clusters. These results show that critical SCCs remain well-defined fractal objects across dimensions, while their approach to the mean-field limit involves nontrivial changes in cluster statistics.

AI.tldr: 本文通过从二维到七维的超立方晶格及完全图的模拟，研究了随机定向键系统中强连通簇(SCC)的逾渗行为。发现低于上临界维度$d_u=6$时，临界SCC具有非平凡的分形维数$d_{\rm SCC}$，尺寸分布满足标度律；高于$d_u$时恢复平均场行为。完全图展现出双标度结构，大SCC服从平均场指数，小SCC则呈现不同幂律。临界巨入簇和巨出簇与标准逾渗簇共享相同分形维数。
AI.motivation: 探索随机定向键系统中强连通簇(SCC)的逾渗临界行为，特别是其分形性质随维度的变化规律，以及从低维到平均场极限的转变过程。
AI.method: 通过大规模数值模拟，在$d=2$到$7$的超立方晶格以及完全图上研究随机定向键系统的SCC逾渗。分析SCC的尺寸分布、分形维数等临界性质，并检验超立方晶格与完全图之间的异同。
AI.result: (1) $d<6$时，临界SCC具有非平凡分形维数$d_{\rm SCC}$，尺寸分布指数$τ_{\rm SCC}=1+d/d_{\rm SCC}$满足超标度关系；(2) $d≥6$时恢复平均场行为，$d_{\rm SCC}/d=1/3$；(3) 完全图SCC尺寸分布具有双标度结构：大SCC指数$τ_{\rm SCC}=4$（平均场），小SCC指数$τ'=1$；(4) 临界巨入/出簇与标准逾渗簇分形维数相同。
AI.conclusion: 临界SCC在不同维度下都是良好定义的分形物体，其向平均场极限的趋近伴随着簇统计的非平凡变化。

title: Exact Organization of Density Matrices and Entanglement Structure in the Kitaev Spin Liquid
summary: We give an exact form of the density matrix of the spin-1/2 Kitaev spin liquid represented in terms of spin operators and study the entanglement structures of the Kitaev honeycomb model within the spin framework. We show that the density matrix is naturally organized by equivalence classes of string operators associated with the underlying gauge structure of the model. With the explicit form of the density matrix, plus the exact Gauss law of the emergent gauge theory and the exact 1-form Wilson symmetry in the Kitaev model, we demonstrate the existence of the underlying symmetry-resolved block-diagonal structure of the reduced density matrix, which gives rise to the extensive degeneracy in the entanglement spectrum. The block-diagonal structure is then proven to be responsible for the separability of the entanglement entropy into the gauge and matter parts. Furthermore, we extend the formalism to subsystems with an odd number of lattice sites, revealing a relation between the entanglement spectrum and the fermion parity that is seldom mentioned in the literature.

AI.tldr: 本文在自旋框架下精确给出了自旋-1/2 Kitaev自旋液体的密度矩阵形式，揭示了其由规范结构决定的弦算符等价类组织方式，并证明了密度矩阵的对称性分辨块对角结构导致了纠缠谱的广泛简并性和纠缠熵的规范-物质部分可分离性，同时扩展到奇数格点子系统，揭示了纠缠谱与费米子宇称的新关系。
AI.motivation: 理解Kitaev蜂窝模型中纠缠结构的内在组织方式，特别是规范结构与纠缠谱、纠缠熵之间的关系。
AI.method: 利用密度矩阵精确形式、涌现规范理论的高斯定律和1-形式Wilson对称性，分析对称性分辨的块对角结构及其对纠缠谱和纠缠熵的影响。
AI.result: 发现密度矩阵具有由弦算符等价类组织的块对角结构，该结构导致纠缠谱的广泛简并性，并使纠缠熵可分解为规范部分和物质部分。此外，奇数格点子系统下纠缠谱与费米子宇称存在新关系。
AI.conclusion: Kitaev自旋液体的纠缠结构由内在规范对称性主导，纠缠熵的规范-物质分离是块对角结构的直接结果，且费米子宇称在奇数子系统中扮演重要角色。

title: I-V characteristics of SNS junctions with a multivalley normal region
summary: In multivalley conductors the inter-valley relaxation time $τ_v$ and the inelastic relaxation time $τ_{in}$ may be significantly longer than the intra-valley momentum relaxation time $τ$. We show that this separation of time scales has dramatic effects on the I-V characteristics of SNS junctions with a multivalley normal region. We generalize the Larkin-Ovchinnikov equations describing superconducting kinetics to the case of multivalley superconductors. We use this generalization to obtain a kinetic description of multivalley SNS junctions. We find that at constant voltage bias $V$, the current $I(V)$ is nonmonotonic; it exhibits two peaks of similar magnitude $I_\text{max,1} \sim I_\text{max,2}$ at $V_1 \sim \hbar(eτ_{in})^{-1}$ and $V_2\sim \hbar(eτ_v)^{-1}$, which may greatly exceed the critical current $I_c(T)$. At constant current bias $I$ we find that in a wide interval, $I_c(T) < I \lesssim I_{\text{jump}}$, the nonlinear resistance of the junction is controlled by the long relaxation times and may be several orders of magnitude smaller than the normal state resistance.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多谷导体中不同时间尺度（谷间弛豫时间τ_v和非弹性弛豫时间τ_in远大于谷内动量弛豫时间τ）对SNS结（超导体-正常金属-超导体结）I-V特性的影响。研究发现，在恒压偏置下电流呈现非单调的双峰结构，峰值位于与弛豫时间相关的电压处；在恒流偏置下，非线性电阻在特定区间内远小于正常态电阻。
AI.motivation: 在多谷导体中，谷间弛豫时间和非弹性弛豫时间可能远大于谷内动量弛豫时间，这种时间尺度的分离对SNS结的输运特性有显著影响，但目前缺乏相关理论研究。
AI.method: 将Larkin-Ovchinnikov方程推广到多谷超导体情形，并利用该推广构建多谷SNS结的动力学描述。
AI.result: 1) 恒压偏置下，I-V曲线呈现非单调双峰结构，两个峰值电流大小相近（I_max,1 ~ I_max,2），分别位于V1 ~ ℏ(eτ_in)^(-1)和V2 ~ ℏ(eτ_v)^(-1)处，且可能远大于临界电流I_c(T)。2) 恒流偏置下，在I_c(T) < I ≲ I_jump的宽区间内，非线性电阻由长弛豫时间控制，可能比正常态电阻小几个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 多谷导体中不同弛豫时间尺度的分离会导致SNS结出现独特的非线性输运行为，包括非单调的I-V特性和显著降低的非线性电阻。

title: Lattice Relaxation in Moiré Heterobilayers
summary: We develop an analytical theory for lattice relaxation in twisted moiré heterobilayers, accounting for lattice mismatch, twist, external biaxial heterostrain, and different elastic constants. Starting from continuum elasticity, we derive the self-consistent equations for the in-plane displacement fields and obtain simple perturbative expressions for the layer-resolved in-plane displacement fields induced by lattice relaxation. We apply our theory to graphene on hBN and representative 2H transition metal dichalcogenide heterobilayers, including MoTe$_2$/WSe$_2$ and WSe$_2$/WS$_2$. Our analytical results agree very well with full numerical solutions over experimentally relevant parameters. We further show that heterobilayers can exhibit a buckling instability near alignment, driven by compressive in-plane strain due to moiré relaxation. Our results provide a simple theoretical framework for incorporating lattice relaxation in realistic moiré heterostructures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了扭曲莫尔异质双层中晶格弛豫的解析理论，考虑了晶格失配、扭转、双轴异质应变和不同弹性常数，推导了面内位移场的自洽方程和微扰表达式，并应用于石墨烯/hBN和TMD异质双层，发现近对齐时可能出现屈曲不稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多依赖数值模拟，缺乏简单解析框架来定量理解莫尔异质结构中晶格弛豫的物理机制及其对电子性质的影响。
AI.method: 基于连续弹性理论，推导面内位移场的自洽方程，得到层分辨的微扰解析表达式；通过数值解验证，并分析屈曲不稳定性条件。
AI.result: 解析结果与完整数值解在实验相关参数范围内高度一致；发现莫尔弛豫引起的压缩面内应变可在近对齐时诱导屈曲不稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 提供了一个简单理论框架，能够将晶格弛豫纳入实际莫尔异质结构的研究中，有助于理解其力学和电子性质。

title: Optical, vibrational, and electronic properties of semiconducting YbN
summary: We investigate the vibrational, optical, and electronic properties of insulating YbN thin films using Raman spectroscopy, Fourier-transform infrared spectroscopy, and electrical transport measurements, supported by density functional theory. Raman spectra reveal the LO($Γ$) phonon and a cation-vacancy mode, while the optical conductivity identifies the TO phonon and an absorption edge corresponding to a 1.7 eV N 2p{$\rightarrow$}Yb 5d transition. The films exhibit thermally activated resistivity consistent with an insulating ground state. An additional defect induced absorption tail below the intrinsic band gap is observed, which in combination with the electrical measurements indicates the Fermi energy resides in a disordered conduction band minimum.

AI.tldr: 本文通过拉曼光谱、红外光谱、电输运测量和DFT计算，系统研究了绝缘性YbN薄膜的振动、光学和电子性质，发现其具有1.7 eV带隙、热激活电阻行为，费米能级位于无序导带底。
AI.motivation: 探究YbN薄膜的振动、光学和电子性质，理解其绝缘基态的物理机制。
AI.method: 采用拉曼光谱、傅里叶变换红外光谱、电输运测量结合密度泛函理论（DFT）计算进行分析。
AI.result: 拉曼光谱显示LO(Γ)声子和阳离子空位模式；光学电导率识别出TO声子和1.7 eV的N 2p→Yb 5d跃迁吸收边；薄膜呈热激活电阻行为；带隙下方存在缺陷诱导吸收尾，费米能级位于无序导带底。
AI.conclusion: YbN薄膜具有绝缘基态，费米能级因无序而钉扎在导带底附近，缺陷态显著影响其光电性质。

title: Model of Simplicial Complexes with dimension-wise preferential attachment
summary: Network science is a powerful framework allowing to model complex systems, it is capable to describe and take into account the intricate web of connections existing among the constituting basic element of the system. Recently scholars have brought to the fore the relevance of higher-order networks, namely structures allowing to encode for many-body interaction, differently from the pairwise case handled by networks. This novel research field opens new avenues of research with applications ranging from neurosciences to social sciences; there is thus a need for generative models of higher-order network capable to reproduce features present in empirical data. In this work we present a model for growing simplicial complex rooted on a preferential attachment process acting dimension-wise, i.e., returning a power law distribution for the generalized degree of simplexes of different dimension.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于维度偏好依附的单纯复形生长模型，能够生成具有不同维度广义度幂律分布的高阶网络，用于模拟真实数据特征。
AI.motivation: 高阶网络（如单纯复形）能编码多体相互作用，比传统成对网络更具表现力，但目前缺乏能够再现实证数据特征的高阶网络生成模型。
AI.method: 提出一种基于维度偏好依附的单纯复形生长模型，该模型在不同维度上分别进行偏好依附过程，使不同维度的单纯形广义度服从幂律分布。
AI.result: 模型能够生成不同维度单纯形的广义度呈幂律分布的单纯复形，再现了实证高阶网络的关键统计特征。
AI.conclusion: 该生成模型为高阶网络研究提供了有力工具，可广泛应用于神经科学、社会科学等领域中多体相互作用系统的建模。

title: Taming the 3D Wilson-Fisher Fixed Point via Nonlocal Effective Action
summary: We present a novel Renormalization Group (RG) framework based on a nonlocal effective action ansatz to tame the strong coupling dynamics of the three-dimensional relativistic $φ^{4}$ theory. By implementing a Hubbard-Stratonovich transformation, we decouple the quartic interaction into a system of the primary field $φ$ and an auxiliary field $\varphi \sim φ^2$. Rather than freezing the intermediate scaling dimensions, the nonlocality of our effective action allows both exponents $Δ_φ$ and $Δ_{\varphi}$ to act as fully independent, unconstrained dynamical variables.This nonlocal propagator framework plays a critical role in the RG flow: evaluating self-energies and vertex fluctuations up to the three-loop order, the nonlocality drives precise structural cross-cancellations among multi-loop fluctuations near the Gaussian limit. Solving the resulting closed two-variable master equations isolates a robust, non-trivial physical fixed point at $Δ_φ^{*} \approx 0.981$ and $Δ_{\varphi}^{*} \approx 0.415$. These dynamic exponents yield a kinematic anomalous dimension $η_φ \approx 0.038$, an energy operator dimension $Δ_{φ^2} \approx 1.417$, and-via mass deformation-a thermal correlation length exponent $ν\approx 0.6317$, demonstrating exceptional quantitative agreement with high-precision Quantum Monte Carlo (QMC) and conformal bootstrap benchmarks. Our results rigorously confirm that unfreezing the nonlocal degrees of freedom successfully eliminates the systematic truncation errors inherent to conventional local ansatz treatments, simultaneously resolving both the static scaling and thermodynamic flows of the Wilson-Fisher universality class.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于非局域有效作用量假设的重整化群（RG）框架，通过Hubbard-Stratonovich变换解耦三维相对论性φ⁴理论的强耦合动力学。非局域传播子允许两个标度维度Δ_φ和Δ_φ作为完全独立的自由变量，在三圈图水平上实现多圈涨落的结构性交叉抵消。求解双变量主方程得到非平凡物理固定点Δ_φ*≈0.981、Δ_φ*≈0.415，导出动力学反常维度η_φ≈0.038、能量算符维度Δ_φ²≈1.417及热关联长度指数ν≈0.6317，与高精度量子蒙特卡洛和共形自举基准结果高度吻合。该工作证明“解冻”非局域自由度可系统消除传统局域作用量近似的截断误差，同时解决了Wilson-Fisher普适类的静态标度和热力学流。
AI.motivation: 传统局域有效作用量处理方法在处理三维φ⁴理论的强耦合RG流时存在系统性的截断误差，无法准确描述Wilson-Fisher普适类。作者旨在通过引入非局域有效作用量，将标度维度Δ_φ和Δ_φ视为完全独立的动力学变量，从而消除局域近似带来的误差，获得与高精度数值方法（QMC、共形自举）一致的结果。
AI.method: (1) 构建非局域有效作用量假设作为RG框架；(2) 实施Hubbard-Stratonovich变换，将四阶相互作用解耦为原始场φ和辅助场φ~φ²的系统；(3) 不冻结中间标度维度，允许Δ_φ和Δ_φ作为完全独立的非约束动力学变量；(4) 利用非局域传播子框架，在三圈图水平计算自能和顶点涨落；(5) 利用非局域性驱动多圈涨落在高斯极限附近的结构性交叉抵消；(6) 求解封闭的双变量主方程，得到固定点及关键指数。
AI.result: 非平凡物理固定点：Δ_φ*≈0.981，Δ_φ*≈0.415。导出关键指数：动力学反常维度η_φ≈0.038，能量算符维度Δ_φ²≈1.417，热关联长度指数ν≈0.6317。与高精度QMC和共形自举基准结果高度吻合，证明非局域自由度方法消除了局域作用量处理的系统截断误差。
AI.conclusion: 本工作严格证实，“解冻”非局域自由度（不再强制固定中间标度维度）能够系统性地消除传统局域有效作用量方法的截断误差，同时精确描述了Wilson-Fisher普适类的静态标度行为和热力学RG流。这为强耦合量子场论和非微扰RG方法提供了新的有效范式。

title: Hydrostatic Pressure-Induced Evolution of the Superconducting Transition Temperature of Bi-2212: Insights from First-Principles Calculations
summary: High-pressure experiments on Bi$_2$Sr$_2$CaCu$_2$O$_{8+x}$ (Bi-2212) have reported apparently conflicting evolutions of the superconducting transition temperature $T_c$, ranging from weak enhancement to strong suppression and even a proposed second superconducting dome. To clarify the origin of these discrepancies, we combine first-principles density functional theory calculations with a pressure-dependent low-energy bilayer model solved by the slave-boson mean-field method together with a Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless estimate of phase coherence. Our results show that hydrostatic pressure induces a pronounced self-doping effect in Bi-2212: holes are transferred from the Bi-O charge-reservoir layers to the CuO$_2$ superconducting planes, leading to a systematic increase in the effective CuO$_2$-plane hole concentration $δ_x$. At the same time, pressure enhances the pairing scale through the renormalization of the hopping and superexchange parameters. As a consequence, the pressure evolution of $T_c$ is governed by the competition between pressure-enhanced pairing and pressure-driven motion along the common $T_c$-$δ_x$ dome, making $T_c(P)$ highly sensitive to the initial doping state. Even samples with very similar ambient-pressure $T_c$ but slightly different initial doping can therefore display qualitatively different pressure responses. This provides a unified interpretation of a large part of the disparate high-pressure behavior reported for Bi-2212 and suggests that slightly underdoped samples are more favorable than ambient-pressure optimal samples for achieving improved superconducting performance under pressure.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算和理论模型，揭示了Bi-2212超导体在高压下Tc行为矛盾的根源：压力通过自掺杂效应增加CuO2面空穴浓度，同时增强配对强度，Tc(P)由初始掺杂状态决定，为解释实验分歧提供了统一框架。
AI.motivation: 高压实验对Bi-2212的Tc演化报道存在分歧（弱增强到强抑制甚至第二个超导穹顶），作者试图澄清这些矛盾的起源。
AI.method: 结合第一性原理密度泛函理论计算、依赖于压力的低能双层模型（slave-boson平均场方法）以及BKT相相干性估计。
AI.result: 静水压导致Bi-O电荷库层向CuO2超导面转移空穴（自掺杂效应），增加有效空穴浓度δx，同时压力通过重整化跳跃和超交换参数增强配对尺度。Tc(P)由压力增强配对与沿Tc-δx穹顶运动的竞争决定，对初始掺杂高度敏感。
AI.conclusion: 统一解释了Bi-2212高压行为的分歧，并指出轻微欠掺杂样品比环境压力最优掺杂样品更有利于在压力下改善超导性能。

title: Multiple Superconducting Phases in Rhombohedral Heptalayer Graphene
comment: To appear in Chin. Phys. Lett
summary: Crystalline rhombohedral multilayer graphene (RMG) has emerged as an ideal platform for studying unconventional superconductivity. Here, we report the observation of superconductivity in moiréless rhombohedral heptalayer graphene (RHG) at zero magnetic field. The superconducting phases emerge at low displacement electric fields (|D| < 0.2 V/nm) and are symmetrically distributed about D = 0, with one robust state exhibiting zero resistance and two weaker superconducting features. Comparisons with rhombohedral pentalayer graphene (RPG) reveal distinct perpendicular magnetic-field responses, and quantum oscillation measurements indicate that superconductivity in RHG arises from a half-metallic normal state. These results highlight the strong dependence of superconductivity on layer number and electronic structure in RMG systems and provide new insights into its microscopic origin.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了在无摩尔超晶格的菱方七层石墨烯（RHG）中零磁场下观测到超导现象，发现超导相在低位移电场下对称出现，其中一种强健态呈现零电阻，通过与五层石墨烯（RPG）对比及量子振荡测量，揭示了超导源于半金属正常态，并强调了层数对超导的关键影响。
AI.motivation: 菱方多层石墨烯（RMG）是研究非常规超导的理想平台，但此前超导现象多与摩尔超晶格相关，本文旨在探索无摩尔结构的菱方七层石墨烯（RHG）中是否本征存在超导，并揭示层数与电子结构对超导的关键作用。
AI.method: 在菱方七层石墨烯（RHG）器件中进行低温输运测量，在零磁场下施加可调位移电场，观测电阻随温度和电场的变化；并与菱方五层石墨烯（RPG）进行垂直磁场响应对比；通过量子振荡测量表征正常态的能带结构。
AI.result: 在零磁场下，RHG在低位移电场（|D|<0.2 V/nm）中出现超导相，对称分布于D=0两侧，其中一种强健态呈现零电阻，另两种为较弱超导特征；RHG与RPG在垂直磁场下的响应截然不同；量子振荡表明超导源自半金属正常态。
AI.conclusion: 菱方七层石墨烯中实现了无摩尔超晶格的本征超导，超导特性强烈依赖于石墨烯层数及对应的电子结构，这为理解菱方多层石墨烯体系中超导的微观起源提供了新视角。

title: Path-Extrema Upper Bounds on Mean Entropy Production
summary: Fluctuation relations imply the second-law inequality $\langleΣ_T\rangle\ge0$, but path extrema can also constrain how large the mean entropy production can be. For steady-state processes with entropy-production martingale $M_t=e^{-Σ_t}$, we show that knowing only the positive running maximum of $Σ_t$ gives no improvement over the trivial endpoint bound: rare negative entropy-production excursions can still carry the exponential weight required by the fluctuation relation. Using the running extrema $L_T=\inf M_t$ and $H_T=\sup M_t$, we derive a path-extrema upper envelope $\mathcal{U}_{\rm ext}$. The relaxed envelope problem ranks realized intervals by the entropy gain per martingale cost, $\ln(H_T/L_T)/(H_T-L_T)$, giving a continuous knapsack problem. The actual mean satisfies the exact identity $\langleΣ_T\rangle=\mathcal{U}_{\rm ext}-\mathcal{A}-\mathcal{C}$, where $\mathcal{A}$ is an allocation gap across realized envelopes and $\mathcal{C}$ is a curvature gap within each envelope. Thus path extrema set the upper envelope, while the two gaps quantify how actual dynamics allocate terminal outcomes across envelope classes and place terminal values within each realized envelope. This turns path-extrema information into a quantitative upper-bound theory for entropy production, complementary to the usual lower-bound role of fluctuation relations.

AI.tldr: 本文表明，仅知道熵产Σ_T的正向最大值无法改进平凡终点界，但利用路径极值M_t的上下确界可推导出熵产的上包络界，并分解出分配间隙和曲率间隙，从而建立熵产的定量上界理论。
AI.motivation: 波动关系仅给出熵产均值⟨Σ_T⟩≥0的下界，而路径极值信息是否能约束熵产的上界尚不清晰，本文旨在探索这一互补问题。
AI.method: 利用熵产鞅M_t=e^{-Σ_T}的路径极值L_T和H_T，定义上包络U_ext，将问题转化为连续背包问题，并通过恒等式⟨Σ_T⟩=U_ext−A−C分解出分配间隙A和曲率间隙C。
AI.result: 仅知道正向最大值无改进；路径极值可给出熵产上包络界；实际均值可分解为上包络减去两个间隙。
AI.conclusion: 路径极值信息可转化为熵产的定量上界理论，与波动关系的下界作用互补。

title: Pressure Effects on CeMnSi: Evolution of Ce 4f and Mn 3d Electronic States and Negative Thermal Expansion
summary: We investigated pressure effects on the nontrivial heavy-fermion antiferromagnet CeMnSi by means of electrical resistivity and powder X-ray diffraction. With increasing pressure, the antiferromagnetic order of Mn (T_N ~ 240 K at ambient pressure) is rapidly suppressed and disappears at P_c ~ 1.3 GPa. Instead, a pressure-induced anomaly appears at T_M ~ 97 K and shifts to higher temperatures with increasing pressure. The switching of the Mn magnetic state may reflect a modification of the magnetic symmetry of the system, which could influence the stability of the heavy-fermion state. In the low-pressure region, non-Fermi-liquid-like behavior characterized by nearly T-linear resistivity is observed around 0.7 GPa. In addition, the resistivity shows a marked reduction below T_M and a qualitative change toward more metallic behavior above the structural transition pressure P_s ~ 5.7 GPa. At ambient pressure, CeMnSi exhibits negative thermal expansion below ~40 K, which is absent in LaMnSi, supporting the formation of a heavy-fermion ground state.

AI.tldr: 本文通过电阻率和X射线衍射实验，研究了压力对重费米子反铁磁体CeMnSi的影响。发现Mn的反铁磁序（T_N ~ 240 K）在约1.3 GPa被抑制，出现新的压力诱导异常（T_M ~ 97 K），并在0.7 GPa附近观察到非费米液体行为，在约5.7 GPa以上出现更金属性的转变。
AI.motivation: 探究压力对重费米子反铁磁体CeMnSi的磁序和电子态的影响，理解磁性转变与重费米子态稳定性之间的关系。
AI.method: 采用电输运测量（电阻率）和粉末X射线衍射方法，在不同压力下研究CeMnSi的结构和物性变化，并与LaMnSi对比。
AI.result: 1) Mn的反铁磁序（T_N ~ 240 K）在P_c ~ 1.3 GPa被抑制；2) 出现压力诱导的新异常T_M ~ 97 K，且随压力升高；3) 0.7 GPa附近观察到近T线性的非费米液体行为；4) 低于T_M电阻率显著降低，在P_s ~ 5.7 GPa以上呈现更金属性的行为；5) CeMnSi在40 K以下出现负热膨胀（LaMnSi中不存在）。
AI.conclusion: 压力有效调控了CeMnSi中Mn的磁序，导致磁性对称性改变，进而影响重费米子态的稳定性。非费米液体行为和负热膨胀现象支持重费米子基态的形成。

title: Strong-coupling anisotropic superconductivity in hexagonal HfRuAs from anisotropic Migdal-Eliashberg theory
summary: We present a comprehensive theoretical investigation of the superconducting (SC) properties of hexagonal HfRuAs ($h$-HfRuAs) by solving anisotropic Migdal--Eliashberg (ME) equations with the inputs from \textit{ab initio} calculations of electronic structure, phonon dispersion and electron phonon coupling matrix elements. The calculated Eliashberg spectral function reveals strong electron--phonon coupling (EPC) with a constant $λ\approx 1.56$, dominated by low-frequency phonon modes associated primarily with Hf and Ru vibrations. The SC state is characterized by a single anisotropic gap with overall $s$-wave symmetry, as evidenced by the fully gapped quasiparticle density of states. The momentum-resolved EPC and SC gap exhibit pronounced anisotropy across different Fermi surface sheets, with the largest variations occurring on the hole-like bands. The SC gap is centered around $Δ\approx 2.9$ meV with a spread of $\sim 0.8$ meV, indicating significant multiband anisotropy. The resulting gap ratio $2Δ(0)/k_B T_c \approx 4.2$ exceeds the BCS weak-coupling limit, establishing $h$-HfRuAs as a strong-coupling superconductor. The calculated transition temperature, $T_c$, agrees in the order of magnitude with experiments. Overall, our results identify $h$-HfRuAs as a phonon-mediated, strongly coupled anisotropic superconductor and provide detailed insights into the role of momentum-dependent electron--phonon interactions in determining its SC properties.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算和Migdal-Eliashberg方程，系统地研究了六方HfRuAs的超导性质，发现其是强耦合、各向异性的s-wave声子介导超导体，具有约1.56的强电子-声子耦合常数，超导能隙约2.9 meV，能隙比2Δ(0)/k_BT_c≈4.2超过BCS弱耦合极限。
AI.motivation: 目前对六方HfRuAs的超导性质缺乏系统的理论研究，尤其是其电子-声子耦合机制、超导能隙的各向异性以及能隙比等关键性质尚未被深入理解。
AI.method: 基于第一性原理计算电子结构、声子色散和电子-声子耦合矩阵元，求解各向异性Migdal-Eliashberg方程，计算Eliashberg谱函数、超导能隙和各向异性性质。
AI.result: Eliashberg谱函数显示强电子-声子耦合(λ≈1.56)，以Hf和Ru的低频振动模为主；超导态为各向异性单能隙s-wave对称性；超导能隙约2.9 meV，扩展约0.8 meV；能隙比2Δ(0)/k_BT_c≈4.2，超过BCS弱耦合极限；计算Tc与实验定性一致。
AI.conclusion: h-HfRuAs被确认为声子介导的强耦合各向异性超导体，动量依赖的电子-声子相互作用对其超导性质起关键作用。

title: Geometric symmetry and size-dependent skyrmion phase transitions in magnetic nanostructures
summary: We investigate the interplay of geometric symmetry, size, and external magnetic fields in regulating individual skyrmion states within magnetic nanostructures. By analyzing nanodisks, nanosquares, and nanorectangles, we demonstrate that rotational symmetry in nanodisks enables rich topological phase transitions, from ferromagnetic states to skyrmions, skyrmioniums, and multi-states, as their diameter increases. In contrast, square and rectangular structures exhibit suppressed topological complexity due to corner-induced demagnetization effects and reduced symmetries. Under perpendicular magnetic fields, nanodisks show field-driven transitions between skyrmionium and skyrmion states. By leveraging asymmetry, square and rectangular nanostructures stabilize skyrmions over a broader parameter range than nanodisks. These findings highlight geometric symmetry as a critical design parameter for tailoring skyrmion stability and functionality in spintronic applications such as multi-state memory and reconfigurable logic devices.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了纳米盘、纳米方和纳米矩形等磁性纳米结构中几何对称性、尺寸和外磁场对单个斯格明子态的调控作用，发现旋转对称性促进丰富的拓扑相变，而角部退磁效应抑制对称性较低结构中的拓扑复杂性。利用不对称性可在更宽参数范围内稳定斯格明子，为自旋电子学多态存储和可重构逻辑器件提供设计指导。
AI.motivation: 探究几何对称性、尺寸和外磁场如何共同调控磁性纳米结构中的单个斯格明子状态，以理解不同几何形状下拓扑相变的机制，并为自旋电子学器件设计提供关键参数依据。
AI.method: 通过对比分析三种几何形状（纳米盘、纳米方、纳米矩形）的磁性纳米结构，研究其在不同尺寸和外加垂直磁场下的斯格明子态演化，系统考察了旋转对称性与角部退磁效应对拓扑相变的影响。
AI.result: 纳米盘随直径增大展现出从铁磁态到斯格明子、斯格明子泡到多态的丰富拓扑相变；纳米方和纳米矩形因角部退磁效应和低对称性导致拓扑复杂性被抑制；纳米盘在垂直磁场下可实现斯格明子泡与斯格明子态之间的场驱动转变；利用不对称性，方形和矩形结构可在更宽参数范围内稳定斯格明子。
AI.conclusion: 几何对称性是调控斯格明子稳定性和功能性的关键设计参数，其对多态存储和可重构逻辑器件等自旋电子学应用具有重要指导意义。

title: Causal Anomaly Detection for Lithium-Ion Battery Degradation
summary: Reliable early detection of lithium-ion battery degradation requires health indicators that are physically interpretable and computable from routine cycler telemetry without access to the degradation region. We introduce \textsc{CausalHealth}, a framework that applies causal graph discovery and $k$-nearest-neighbour transfer entropy to per-cycle voltage, current, temperature, and resistance time series, and organises twelve resulting anomaly scores into three signal-class bundles (Magnitude-shift, Predictive-residual, Complexity-entropy) -- with Isolation Forest reported separately as it falls below the bundle reliability threshold -- to characterise detection sensitivity across ten commissioning fractions (5--30\,\%). The Magnitude-shift class achieves 100\,\% detection across all seven tested cells spanning LFP (MIT--Stanford MATR) and LCO (NASA PCoE, CALCE CS2) chemistries, with a lead time of up to 402 cycles before conventional capacity-threshold failure on gradual-fade cells. A Reliability-Weighted Master Health Index (RWMHI) -- a cross-bundle fusion of five high-reliability detectors weighted by inverse coefficient of variation -- improves lead time by 15--52 cycles over the class median on long-lived cells while maintaining 100\,\% detection. Validation against electrochemical impedance spectroscopy on an NMC prismatic cell provides independent physical grounding: transfer entropy $\mathrm{TE}(R \!\to\! V)$ correlates with charge-transfer resistance $R_{\mathrm{ct}}$ (pooled $r = +0.990$; temperature-controlled partial $r = +0.898$), and an Arrhenius analysis of both quantities yields an activation energy consistent with published NMC charge-transfer kinetics. These results are evaluated on seven cells across three benchmark datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出CausalHealth框架，利用因果图发现和k近邻转移熵从电池循环数据中提取健康指标，实现早期退化检测。在多种化学体系电池上验证，Magnitude-shift类检测率达100%，最多提前402个循环检测到退化。RWMHI融合指标在长寿电池上提升15-52个循环。通过EIS验证了转移熵与电荷转移电阻的高度相关性(r=0.990)。
AI.motivation: 现有的锂离子电池退化早期检测需要物理可解释的健康指标，且这些指标需能从常规循环遥测数据中计算，无需访问退化区域。现有方法在检测灵敏度、提前时间和物理可解释性方面存在不足。
AI.method: 提出CausalHealth框架：使用因果图发现和k近邻转移熵分析每个循环的电压、电流、温度和电阻时间序列；将12个异常分数组织为三个信号类（Magnitude-shift、Predictive-residual、Complexity-entropy）；提出可靠性加权主健康指数(RWMHI)，融合五个高可靠性检测器。
AI.result: Magnitude-shift类在7个电池（LFP和LCO化学体系）上实现100%检测，提前量最多402个循环。RWMHI在长寿电池上比类中位数提高15-52个循环。转移熵TE(R→V)与电荷转移电阻Rct高度相关(r=0.990)，活化能与文献一致。
AI.conclusion: CausalHealth框架能够实现物理可解释的早期退化检测，在不同化学体系上表现优异，并通过电化学阻抗谱验证了其物理基础。

title: Observation of universal thermopolarization effect in insulators
summary: Heat-to-charge conversion has traditionally been realized via the Seebeck effect in conductors and pyroelectricity in polar insulators. Here, we demonstrate that temperature gradients generate electrical polarization, namely thermopolarization, in a wide range of insulators through a thermomechanical pathway. We identify a mechanism where thermal expansion under a temperature gradient produces strain gradients that induce polarization via the flexoelectric effect. Using a device with an on-chip heater, we detect the heat-induced polarization in crystalline, polymeric, and amorphous systems, including MgO, Al$_2$O$_3$, MnO, mica, PET, PEN, polyimide, and soda-lime glass. The magnitude of the response exhibits a robust scaling with the coefficient of thermal expansion, which is reproduced by finite-element simulations. Furthermore, we identify two routes to enhance the response: reducing the sample thickness and exploiting structural instabilities such as glass and antiferromagnetic phase transitions, where more than an order-of-magnitude enhancement is observed. These results establish a symmetry-independent route for heat-to-charge conversion in insulators and provide a device-compatible platform for electrically probing lattice responses, with potential for enhancement in nanoscale systems such as two-dimensional materials.

AI.tldr: 本文发现温度梯度可在多种绝缘体（晶体、聚合物、非晶）中通过热机械途径诱导电极化，即“热极化”现象。其机制是热膨胀在温度梯度下产生应变梯度，通过挠曲电效应诱导极化。实验和仿真验证了响应与热膨胀系数的标度关系，并通过减薄样品厚度和利用结构相变（玻璃转变、反铁磁转变）实现一个数量级以上的增强。该工作为绝缘体中的热-电转换提供了一种对称性无关的普适路径。
AI.motivation: 传统热-电转换依赖导体的Seebeck效应或极性绝缘体的热释电效应，两者均受材料对称性限制。作者希望探索一种对称性无关的、普适的绝缘体热-电转换机制。
AI.method: 利用片上加热器产生温度梯度，在多种绝缘体（MgO、Al₂O₃、MnO、云母、PET、PEN、聚酰亚胺、钠钙玻璃）中测量热诱导极化。结合有限元仿真，分析热膨胀系数与响应的标度关系。通过减薄样品厚度、利用玻璃转变和反铁磁相变增强响应。
AI.result: 实验验证了温度梯度可诱导极化（热极化），响应幅度与热膨胀系数呈鲁棒标度关系，仿真结果与实验一致。减薄厚度及利用相变（玻璃转变、反铁磁转变）可实现一个数量级以上的增强。
AI.conclusion: 建立了绝缘体中对称性无关的热-电转换新途径，机理基于热膨胀-应变梯度-挠曲电效应的热机械级联。该工作提供了器件兼容的电学探测晶格响应平台，并在二维材料等纳米体系中具有进一步增强的潜力。

title: Exact solution and pair correlation functions for a generalized three-chain Ising tube with multispin interactions
summary: We obtain an exact solution for a generalized three-chain Ising tube (TCGIT) of length $L$ with toroidal boundary conditions and the most general $C_3$-invariant Hamiltonian on an elementary prism, containing 20 independent coupling constants, including an external magnetic field. Using an $8\times 8$ transfer matrix, we derive the exact partition function of the finite system and obtain the free energy, internal energy, specific heat, magnetization, magnetic susceptibility, and entropy in the thermodynamic limit $L\to\infty$. In the general case, $λ_{\max}$ is determined by a quartic equation, whereas in the principal special case with even-spin interactions (PSC) the spectrum simplifies substantially: the characteristic polynomial factorizes, and $λ_{\max}$ is given by the root of a quadratic equation. For mirror-symmetric subfamilies, we derive explicit formulas for the pair correlation functions and express the magnetization in terms of the components of the eigenvector associated with $λ_{\max}$; in the even-spin case with $h=0$, the magnetization vanishes. Important special cases include the width-three planar model with nearest-neighbor, next-nearest-neighbor, and plaquette interactions, including the entropy limit $S(T\to0^+)=(\ln 2)/3$ for $k\ge 0$ and $S(T\to0^+)=0$ for $k<0$, as well as the width-three planar triangular model with distinct nearest-neighbor couplings, three-spin interactions involving neighboring triangles, and an external field.

AI.tldr: 本文精确求解了具有环面边界条件的广义三链伊辛管模型（TCGIT），得到了包含20个独立耦合常数的热力学量解析解，并分析了特殊情形下的相变行为与关联函数。
AI.motivation: 处理一般化的三链伊辛管模型，期望获得在包含多种相互作用及外磁场下的精确解，填补该领域解析研究的空白。
AI.method: 利用8×8转移矩阵，在有限系统上精确推导配分函数，通过热力学极限得到自由能、内能、比热、磁化率、磁化强度和熵；在一般情况下λ_max由四次方程决定，偶自旋相互作用特殊情形下谱分解简化。
AI.result: 得到了一般情况和偶自旋情形下的精确热力学量；镜面对称子族下推导了配对关联函数和磁化强度的解析表达式；在宽度为3的平面模型中发现了熵极限S(T→0⁺) = (ln2)/3（k≥0）和S(T→0⁺)=0（k<0）的行为。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为广义三链伊辛管模型提供了完整的精确解框架，揭示了多种相互作用和外磁场下的统计力学性质，特别是偶自旋情形和平面模型中的特殊熵行为。

title: Quantum geometry induced anomalous chiral transport and hidden symmetry breaking in centrosymmetric 2M-WS2
summary: Chirality, a widely existing material property in nature involving the breaking of the left-right symmetry, has profound influences in various fields of natural sciences. Nonlinear response, such as electronic magnetochiral anisotropy (eMChA), has been recognized as a sensitive probe for the effects of symmetry breaking and nontrivial quantum geometries in solids. So far, observations of eMChA have primarily been limited to inversion-symmetry broken materials. Here, we report a remarkable chiral transport in centrosymmetric candidate topological superconductor 2M-WS2 flakes observed via second-harmonic generation under an out-of-plane magnetic field. More importantly, the eMChA becomes significant around the crossover temperature TFL ~ 25 K from the Fermi liquid (FL) to strange metal (SM) in the normal state, which interestingly echoes with the anomalously large Nernst response at the same temperature in bulk 2M-WS2. These observations reveal a direct correspondence between the nonlinear response, Nernst response, and FL-SM transition in 2M-WS2. Theoretical analysis indicates that nontrivial quantum geometry is behind the simultaneous response of eMChA and Nernst effects in 2M-WS2 and the contribution from the orbital magnetic moment at the Fermi surface becomes significant during the FL-SM transition. Based on first-principles calculations, a thick-layer-sliding mechanism with minimal energy gain in 2M-WS2 provides one possibility for the generation of such nontrivial quantum geometry. The intertwined physics of remarkable eMChA, Nernst response, and FL-SM transition make 2M-WS2 a rare quantum platform to study the chiral transport and unexplored phenomena in strange metals, which may shed light on the trans-century, unresolved scientific issue in unconventional high-temperature superconductivity.

AI.tldr: 本文在中心对称候选拓扑超导体2M-WS2薄片中观测到显著的手性输运现象（电子磁手性各向异性，eMChA），该现象在费米液体到奇异金属的交叉温度(~25 K)附近显著增强，并与异常大的Nernst响应相关联。理论分析表明，非平凡量子几何及费米面上轨道磁矩的贡献是背后机制，层间滑动机制可能产生这种量子几何。这些发现将手性输运、Nernst响应和FL-SM转变联系起来，为研究奇异金属中的手性输运和高温超导机制提供了新平台。
AI.motivation: 此前eMChA的观测主要局限于反演对称性破缺的材料，而本文希望在中心对称材料中探索手性输运现象，并建立其与奇异金属态和高温超导问题之间的联系。
AI.method: 在2M-WS2薄片中施加垂直面外磁场，通过二次谐波产生技术测量eMChA；结合Nernst效应测量、理论分析（非平凡量子几何）和第一性原理计算（层间滑动机制）进行综合研究。
AI.result: 在中心对称的2M-WS2中观测到显著的eMChA；该效应在费米液体到奇异金属转变温度(~25 K)附近显著增强；eMChA与Nernst响应在该温度下呈对应关系；理论揭示非平凡量子几何和费米面上轨道磁矩的贡献是关键。
AI.conclusion: 2M-WS2是一个研究手性输运和奇异金属中未探索现象的罕见量子平台，对手性输运、Nernst效应和FL-SM转变的研究可能为高温超导这一跨世纪科学难题提供新的认识。

title: Direction-selective triplet pairing and spin-edge locking in altermagnetic metals
summary: We investigate self-consistent unconventional superconductivity in a two-dimensional $d$-wave altermagnetic metal. We find that momentum-dependent altermagnetic spin splitting suppresses opposite-spin singlet pairing and stabilizes highly anisotropic equal-spin triplet order. In the spin-conserving limit, this directional triplet pairing gives rise to nearly dispersionless Majorana boundary states associated with effective one-dimensional topological channels. Rashba spin-orbit coupling mixes spin sectors, activates additional pairing components, and drives the system into a mixed-parity superconducting state with dispersive Majorana boundary states. The spin-resolved boundary spectra further reveal a characteristic locking between boundary orientation and spin polarization, reflecting the underlying altermagnetic symmetry. These results identify altermagnetic spin splitting as an intrinsic mechanism for selecting unconventional pairing and generating spin-resolved Majorana boundary states without external magnetic fields.

AI.tldr: 研究二维d波交替磁金属中的自洽非常规超导，发现交替磁自旋分裂抑制自旋单重态配对并稳定各向异性自旋三重态，产生Majorana边界态和自旋分辨边界谱。
AI.motivation: 探索交替磁金属中无需外磁场即可产生非常规超导配对和Majorana边界态的内在机制。
AI.method: 通过自洽理论研究d波交替磁金属中的超导配对，分析动量依赖的自旋分裂对配对对称性的影响，并引入Rashba自旋轨道耦合进行对比研究。
AI.result: 交替磁自旋分裂抑制自旋单重态配对，稳定高度各向异性的自旋三重态；自旋守恒下产生近无色散的Majorana边界态；Rashba耦合激活混合宇称态和色散Majorana边界态；边界谱展现边界取向与自旋极化的锁存关系。
AI.conclusion: 交替磁自旋分裂是一种无需外磁场即可选择非常规配对并产生自旋分辨Majorana边界态的内在机制。

title: Multi-rotational switching in a noncollinear antiferromagnet by spin-orbit torque
summary: Spintronics has advanced through discoveries of various electrically-driven spin dynamics in nanomagnets. Here, we report a novel switching dynamics of spin systems driven by spin-orbit torque, using a noncollinear antiferromagnetic nanodot. With electric pulses spanning a wide range of durations and amplitudes, we find an unconventional insensitivity of a threshold current density to pulse duration in switch-back events. This observation is attributed to a previously unrecognized process, in which the noncollinear antiferromagnetic order undergoes multiple rotations before completing reversal, a phenomenon we term multi-rotational switching. Our theoretical analysis reveals that multi-rotational switching arises from the interplay of three key factors: current-driven coherent rotation of the noncollinear antiferromagnetic order, field-induced reorientation of the uncompensated net magnetization, and thermal fluctuations. These findings establish a microscopic mechanism governing current-induced switching in noncollinear antiferromagnets, a topic of growing interest for next-generation spintronics technologies, opening a new route to controlling antiferromagnetic order in nanodevices.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了非共线反铁磁纳米点中由自旋轨道力矩驱动的一种新型开关动力学——多旋转开关（multi-rotational switching），其阈值电流密度对脉冲宽度表现出非传统的不敏感性，揭示了电流驱动相干旋转、磁场重定向与热涨落三者协同作用的微观机制。
AI.motivation: 探索非共线反铁磁体中电流诱导磁化翻转的新型微观动力学机制，为下一代自旋电子学器件提供新的控制手段。
AI.method: 通过对非共线反铁磁纳米点施加宽范围时长和幅度的电脉冲，观察开关回跳事件中阈值电流密度的反常行为；结合理论分析，揭示非共线反铁磁序在翻转前经历多次旋转的物理过程。
AI.result: 发现开关回跳事件中阈值电流密度对脉冲时长具有非传统的不敏感性，归因于非共线反铁磁序在完全翻转前经历多次旋转（多旋转开关）。
AI.conclusion: 建立了非共线反铁磁体中电流诱导开关的微观机制，为利用反铁磁序控制纳米器件开辟了新路径，对下一代自旋电子学技术具有重要意义。

title: Charge order on a triangular lattice with Mott physics and arbitrary charge density
comment: 14 pages, 7 figures, 80 references; RevTeX class, double-column formatting; includes also Supplemental Material (3 pages, 4 figures)
summary: Triangular-lattice systems attract a lot of attention due to various frustration-induced and strongly correlated effects. Here, we focus on the charge-ordering phenomenon by means of investigation of the extended Hubbard model with dynamical mean-field theory (DMFT). By considering the intersite nearest-neighbor interaction we have found a very rich phase diagram that contains large number of features, phases, and phase transitions. Among them are pinball-liquid (PL) phases where we distinguish charge-transfer-driven and Mott-localization-driven PLs; phase transitions that change their order as model parameters evolve (from discontinuous to continuous); very strong particle-hole asymmetry. Various features of the phase diagram are found to be better understood by means of the simple mean-field approximation (MFA). Moreover, besides helping with interpretation of the phase diagram, the MFA results together with results for the atomic-limit model are found to be able to set rather good expectations on how the DMFT phase diagram should look like. Nevertheless, a few features were not expected and are found within the DMFT, such as a small-region intermediate metallic phase on an electron-doped side of the phase diagram.

AI.tldr: 本文通过动力学平均场理论（DMFT）研究三角晶格扩展Hubbard模型中的电荷有序现象，发现了包含"钉球液体"相、由连续到不连续的相变阶次变化、强粒子-空穴不对称性等丰富相图特征，并指出平均场近似和原子极限模型能较好预测DMFT结果，但DMFT也发现了如电子掺杂侧小区域中间金属相等意外特征。
AI.motivation: 三角晶格系统因其丰富的阻挫效应和强关联现象而备受关注，本文聚焦于其中的电荷有序现象，旨在通过扩展Hubbard模型揭示其复杂相图背后的物理机制。
AI.method: 采用动力学平均场理论（DMFT）研究三角晶格扩展Hubbard模型，考虑最近邻格点间的相互作用，并与简单平均场近似（MFA）及原子极限模型结果进行对比分析。
AI.result: 发现了包含电荷转移驱动和Mott局域化驱动的"钉球液相"（PL）、相变阶次随参数变化（从不连续到连续）、粒子-空穴强不对称性等丰富相图特征；MFA和原子极限模型能较好预测DMFT相图，但DMFT还发现了电子掺杂侧的小区域中间金属相等新特征。
AI.conclusion: 三角晶格扩展Hubbard模型在DMFT框架下展现出极其丰富的相图，MFA可辅助解释相图，但DMFT能揭示出无法被简单近似捕获的新奇物理现象。

title: On-chip detection of anisotropic thermopolarization in quartz
summary: Temperature gradients are widely used to drive and probe transport phenomena in solids, forming the basis of heat-to-charge conversion processes. In typical experiments, local heating is introduced to generate a temperature gradient, and the resulting electrical response is detected by separate electrodes. Such measurements usually regard heating purely as a source of thermal excitation. Here, we show that heating inherently generates mechanical stress through thermal expansion, which in turn produces measurable electrical signals via electromechanical coupling. Using quartz as a model piezoelectric system, we demonstrate that heat can be converted to electrical currents via thermally generated stress. The on-chip device used in our experiment enables us to probe the anisotropy of the piezoelectric tensor through the thermally generated current, exhibiting twofold and threefold responses for X-cut and Z-cut crystals, respectively. We further show that the response can be detected in both current and voltage modes. These results reveal a thermomechanical pathway for heat-to-charge conversion and establish a general platform for electrically probing thermomechanical responses in insulating materials.

AI.tldr: 本文发现加热通过热膨胀产生机械应力，进而通过压电效应将热能转化为电流，揭示了热-机械-电转换的新路径。
AI.motivation: 传统热电研究中仅将加热视为热激发源，忽视了热膨胀产生的机械应力对电信号的贡献，本文旨在揭示这一被忽略的机制。
AI.method: 以石英为模型压电系统，利用片上器件产生温度梯度，测量热致应力产生的电流，并探测X-cut和Z-cut晶体的压电各向异性。
AI.result: 成功观察到热通过热膨胀产生机械应力从而产生电流的现象；X-cut和Z-cut晶体分别表现出两重和三重对称响应；可在电流模式和电压模式两种方式下检测。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了热-机械-电转换的热机械路径，为绝缘材料中热机械响应的电学探测建立了普适平台。

title: Variational Boundary Fluctuations as a First-Principles Origin of Langevin Noise
summary: Stochastic forces are usually postulated or obtained by eliminating environmental degrees of freedom. Here we identify a variational origin: fluctuating endpoint data in Hamilton's principle induce fluctuations of the on-shell action. Hamilton--Jacobi propagation transports this boundary imprint, whose gradient generates an effective Langevin force inherited from boundary-action fluctuations. The resulting force is not freely specifiable: its amplitude is filtered by the Hessian of Hamilton's principal function, yielding multiplicative and state-dependent noise. Homogeneous additive Langevin forcing is recovered only as a Markovian coarse-grained limit.

AI.tldr: 本文从变分原理出发，证明哈密顿原理中端点数据的波动会导致壳上作用量的波动，通过哈密顿-雅可比传播，这种边界波动梯度产生有效朗之万力。该力并非自由设定，其振幅受哈密顿主函数的海森矩阵过滤，产生乘性和状态依赖的噪声，仅在马氏粗粒化极限下恢复为均匀加性朗之万力。
AI.motivation: 传统的随机力通常是通过假设或消除环境自由度得到的，缺乏第一性原理基础。本文旨在从变分原理的边界条件出发，为随机力提供一个变分起源的解释。
AI.method: 利用哈密顿原理中端点数据的波动，通过哈密顿-雅可比传播机制，将边界印记传递到壳上作用量中，其梯度产生有效朗之万力。
AI.result: 得到的随机力不是自由设定的，其振幅受哈密顿主函数的海森矩阵过滤，产生乘性和状态依赖的噪声。均匀加性朗之万力仅作为马氏粗粒化极限恢复。
AI.conclusion: 随机力可以从变分原理的边界条件中自然产生，提供了随机力的变分起源解释，并揭示了其与哈密顿-雅可比理论的深层联系。

title: Frustration from Localized Zhang-Rice States: A Unified Theory of Doping-Driven Magnetic Transitions in Cuprates
comment: 4.5 pages, 3 figs, SM will be updated later
summary: The microscopic mechanism by which doped holes disrupt the antiferromagnetic order is one of the fundamental questions in cuprates. In this work, we propose a unified microscopic theory in which doped holes form spatially localized Zhang-Rice singlets which actively mediate emergent spin exchange. Rather than acting as simple non-magnetic vacancies, these localized states introduce emergent next-nearest $J_2$ and third-nearest $J_3$ neighbor superexchanges. This dopant-induced exchange pathway generates significant magnetic frustration, naturally explaining the rapid collapse of the Néel AFM order and the emergence of a spin-glass phase on the hole-doped side. Our findings provide a comprehensive framework for understanding the complex doping-driven magnetic phase transitions and magnetic electron-hole asymmetry in lightly doped cuprates.

AI.tldr: 本文提出掺杂空穴会形成局域化的Zhang-Rice单态，并引入新的超交换相互作用（J2和J3），导致磁阻挫，从而解释了铜氧化物中反铁磁序的快速坍塌和自旋玻璃相的出现。
AI.motivation: 解释掺杂空穴如何破坏铜氧化物中反铁磁序的微观机制，这是铜氧化物高温超导领域的基本问题之一。
AI.method: 提出了一个统一的微观理论：掺杂空穴形成空间局域化的Zhang-Rice单态，这些局域态不是简单的非磁性空位，而是能引入次近邻J2和第三近邻J3的超交换作用，产生磁阻挫。
AI.result: 该理论自然解释了Néel反铁磁序的快速坍塌以及空穴掺杂侧自旋玻璃相的出现，并为理解轻掺杂铜氧化物中掺杂驱动的磁相变和磁电子-空穴不对称性提供了统一框架。
AI.conclusion: 掺杂空穴通过Zhang-Rice单态引入长程超交换和磁阻挫，是理解铜氧化物磁性质的关键机制。

title: Phase dynamics and dissipation in tunnel ferromagnetic Josephson junctions
