summary: We investigate tunnel ferromagnetic Josephson junctions based on Superconductor-Insulator-thin superconductor-Ferromagnet-Superconductor multilayers. A comparative study of their electrodynamic properties is performed for junctions with niobium and aluminum (Al) electrodes, featuring different ferromagnetic interlayer materials and lateral dimensions ranging from the micrometric to the submicrometric scale. The parameters extracted from the fitting of the current-voltage characteristics using the tunnel junction microscopic model are found to be consistent with those independently estimated from switching current distribution measurements. Submicrometric Al-based devices exhibit electrodynamic properties comparable to those implemented in state-of-the-art transmon qubits and display clear signatures of quantum phase diffusion. The strong agreement between transport modelling and escape dynamics establishes a robust framework for describing hybrid ferromagnetic Josephson junctions consistent with their energy scales and supports their potential integration into superconducting quantum and classical digital circuits.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于超导-绝缘体-薄超导-铁磁-超导多层结构的隧道铁磁约瑟夫森结，对比了铌和铝电极、不同铁磁材料及微米到亚微米尺寸结的电动力学特性。亚微米铝基器件表现出与transmon量子比特相当的参数，并显示量子相位扩散特征。输运模型与逃逸动力学的高度一致性支持了该类结在超导量子及经典数字电路中的集成潜力。
AI.motivation: 探索铁磁约瑟夫森结在超导量子电路和经典数字电路中的集成潜力，验证其电动力学特性是否与现有量子比特（如transmon）兼容。
AI.method: 制备铌和铝电极的S-I-s-F-S多层隧道结，改变铁磁层材料和结尺寸（微米至亚微米级）；通过隧道结微观模型拟合电流-电压特性提取参数；利用开关电流分布测量独立验证参数一致性。
AI.result: 参数拟合结果与开关电流分布测量结果一致；亚微米铝基器件特性与transmon量子比特相当，并观察到量子相位扩散行为；输运模型与逃逸动力学高度吻合。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了描述混合铁磁约瑟夫森结的稳健框架，证明其在超导量子电路和经典数字电路中具有集成可行性。

title: Strong nanomechanical Duffing nonlinearity and interactions induced through cavity optomechanics
summary: Nonlinearity is a key resource in both classical and quantum signal processing. Nonlinear nanomechanical elements have found applications ranging from sensing to computing, while networks of nonlinear resonators, as well as nonlinearly coupled networks of linear resonators, constitute promising platforms for simulating complex dynamics. Here, we experimentally demonstrate an approach to realizing strong mechanical nonlinearity in nanomechanical resonators, fully controlled through optical laser drives. The mechanism exploits the nonlinearity of the radiation-pressure interaction in a cavity optomechanical system, which gives rise to a nonlinear optical spring effect. The resulting Duffing nonlinearity is conveniently tunable in strength via pump laser power, while its sign is controlled by laser detuning. Moreover, we demonstrate that the nonlinear optical spring mediates effective interactions between mechanical modes coupled to a common cavity, inducing tunable nonlinear interactions between them that impact spectral response and dynamics. These results establish cavity optomechanics as a versatile and in-situ reconfigurable platform for engineering nonlinear dynamics in resonators and networks.

AI.tldr: 本文实验展示了一种通过光学激光驱动在纳米机械谐振器中实现强机械非线性的方法，利用腔光机械系统中辐射压相互作用的非线性产生可调谐Duffing非线性，并能在共同腔的机械模式间诱导可调非线性相互作用。
AI.motivation: 非线性的重要性和纳米机械谐振器中实现强非线性控制的需求，以及现有方法的局限性。
AI.method: 利用腔光机械系统中辐射压相互作用的非线性，产生非线性光学弹簧效应，通过泵浦激光功率和失谐量分别控制非线性强度和符号。
AI.result: 实现了强度可调、符号可控的Duffing非线性，并展示了共同腔中机械模式间的可调非线性相互作用。
AI.conclusion: 腔光机械学可作为一种多功能、原位可重构的平台，用于在谐振器和网络中设计非线性动力学。

title: Electronic mechanism of sub-100-fs demagnetization induced by a femtosecond light pulse
comment: 11 pages, 4 figures, 85 references; includes Supplementary Information (1 pdf file - 8 pages, 6 figures). This is the author created version of an article accepted for publication in Scientific Reports journal. The article has been published on a gold open access basis under a CC BY 4.0 licence
summary: A quantitative understanding of the processes that trigger light-induced demagnetization on ultrashort timescales is crucial for achieving an ultrafast, radiation-controlled magnetic response in materials. This milestone is essential for developing next-generation magnetic storage devices and ultrafast magnetic switches. In this theoretical study, we investigated demagnetization triggered in a single magnetic domain by light pulses ranging from a few to a few tens of femtoseconds in duration, with photon energies spanning the optical and X-ray regimes, under strongly non-equilibrium conditions. We predicted a loss of magnetization in the sub-100-fs range in all cases, primarily due to the excitation of the electronic system and the subsequent redistribution of electrons within the magneto-sensitive band. The considered timescales were too short for phonon-mediated processes or inter-site Heisenberg exchange processes to contribute significantly. These findings pave the way for highly accurate, radiation-driven magnetization control in magnetic materials at sub-100-femtosecond timescales with potential practical applications.

AI.tldr: 本文通过理论模型研究了光脉冲（飞秒至数十飞秒，光子能量从光学到X射线范围）在强非平衡条件下触发单磁畴超快退磁的机制。预测亚100飞秒内磁化损失主要由电子系统激发和磁敏带内电子重分布导致，而非声子或海森堡交换过程。为亚百飞秒时间尺度上辐射驱动的磁化控制奠定基础。
AI.motivation: 理解超快时间尺度上光致退磁的定量机制，以实现超快、辐射可控的磁响应，推动下一代磁存储器件和超快磁开关的发展。
AI.method: 采用理论计算方法，研究不同脉冲宽度（几飞秒到几十飞秒）和不同光子能量（光学到X射线）的光脉冲在强非平衡条件下对单磁畴的退磁效应。
AI.result: 在所有研究条件下均预测到亚100飞秒时间尺度的磁化损失，主要机制是电子系统激发及磁敏带内电子重分布；声子介导过程和海森堡交换过程在此时标下贡献不显著。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为在亚百飞秒时间尺度上实现高精度辐射驱动磁化控制提供了理论和应用基础。

title: Frequency renormalization and its effects in nonlinear phononics with $Q_RQ_{IR}^{2}$-type coupling
summary: A two-phonon system with lowest-order coupling of form $Q_RQ_{IR}^2$ is studied by perturbation method, and analytic results for both phonon displacements and frequencies are obtained. The frequency renormalization of infrared (IR) active mode brings the rectification of Raman mode to saturate at high pump field. For degenerate IR mode with coupling of form $Q_R(Q_{IR,x}^2-Q_{IR,y}^2)$, the frequency of IR mode will split when resonantly pumped by elliptically or linearly polarized ultrashort mid-IR pulse, realizing Raman rectification and magnetization simultaneously. Our results reveal a dynamical effect of nonlinear phononics not captured by first-principles calculation, extend the dynamical multiferroicity to systems with coupling $Q_R(Q_{IR,x}^2-Q_{IR,y}^2)$, and the method can be readily applied to higher-order couplings. The amplitude saturation under strong pump field stimulates future researches to overcome this nonlinear effect.

AI.tldr: 本文通过微扰方法研究具有最低阶耦合 $Q_RQ_{IR}^2$ 的双声子系统，获得了声子位移和频率的解析结果。红外（IR）活性模式的频率重整化导致拉曼模式的整流在高泵浦场下趋于饱和。对于耦合形式为 $Q_R(Q_{IR,x}^2-Q_{IR,y}^2)$ 的简并红外模式，椭圆或线偏振超短中红外脉冲共振泵浦会导致红外模式频率分裂，同时实现拉曼整流和磁化。该结果揭示了第一性原理计算未捕捉到的非线性声子动力学效应，将动态多铁性扩展到耦合 $Q_R(Q_{IR,x}^2-Q_{IR,y}^2)$ 的系统，并可直接应用于高阶耦合。强泵浦场下的振幅饱和为克服这一非线性效应提供了未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 研究非线性声子学中尚未被第一性原理计算捕获的动力学效应，并探索通过光泵浦实现拉曼整流和磁化的新机制。
AI.method: 采用微扰方法对双声子系统进行解析研究，分析不同耦合形式（$Q_RQ_{IR}^2$ 和 $Q_R(Q_{IR,x}^2-Q_{IR,y}^2)$）下的声子位移和频率行为。
AI.result: 1）IR模式频率重整化导致拉曼整流在高泵浦场下饱和；2）简并IR模式在椭圆/线偏振泵浦下发生频率分裂，同时实现整流和磁化。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了非线性声子学的新动力学效应，将动态多铁性扩展到新的耦合系统，并指出了强场下振幅饱和这一待解决的非线性问题。

title: Iterative maps emerging from cohomological structure of primes
summary: Prime numbers appeared in contexts spanning statistical mechanics, quantum mechanics and dynamical systems. However, the mechanisms governing the irregularities observed in their sequence and linking them to physical systems remained unclear. Here, it is shown that prime gaps at different separation distances follow a function depending on that distance and can be described by an iterative map which predicts the primary growth of successive primes. On the other hand, the analysis of remaining fluctuations reveals the existence of a well-defined cohomological structure, where the deterministic functional relation holds for primes up to small decaying fluctuations. In consequence, the long-range correlations as well as local jumps in primes encode the underlying cohomological structure where prime numbers are states of a given system that becomes deterministic asymptotically. Remarkably, the solution to this cohomological equation turns out to be the logarithmic integral function.

AI.tldr: 本文发现素数间隔遵循一个依赖于距离的函数，可通过迭代映射描述，并揭示其背后的上同调结构（解为对数积分函数），表明素数序列在渐近意义下具有确定性。
AI.motivation: 素数在统计力学、量子力学和动力系统中频繁出现，但其序列不规则性的机制以及与物理系统的联系尚不明确，因此作者希望揭示素数间隔背后的数学规律。
AI.method: 通过分析不同分离距离下的素数间隔，建立迭代映射来描述素数的主要增长；对剩余波动进行上同调分析，揭示确定性函数关系并求解对应方程。
AI.result: 素数间隔遵循一个距离依赖的函数；存在一个上同调结构，使得确定性关系在小波动下成立；该上同调方程的解是对数积分函数。
AI.conclusion: 素数可被视为某个系统在渐近意义下的确定性状态，其长程关联和局部跳跃都编码了上同调结构。

title: Interlayer electronic coherence links magnetism and superconductivity in Ruddlesden-Popper nickelates
summary: The extent to which electronic dimensionality influences magnetism and superconductivity in Ruddlesden-Popper (RP) nickelates remains unsettled. Here we report high-precision crystallographic-axis-resolved dc transport measurements on high-quality single crystals of bilayer and trilayer RP nickelates. Using a six-terminal geometry, we self-consistently determine the intrinsic in-plane ($ρ_\parallel$) and out-of-plane ($ρ_\bot$) resistivities on the same crystal, while minimizing uncertainties associated with current redistribution in highly anisotropic conductors. We uncover strong intrinsic electronic anisotropy in both bilayer and trilayer nickelates, in contrast to the weak anisotropy inferred from conventional four-probe measurements. Moreover, $ρ_\bot$ exhibits a nonmonotonic temperature dependence, revealing a universal coherent-to-incoherent crossover in interlayer transport. Across the RP nickelate series, the maximum superconducting transition temperature ($T_c$) observed under pressure is inversely correlated with the ambient-pressure resistivity anisotropy, suggesting that stronger interlayer electronic coherence is favorable for superconductivity. In addition, $ρ_\bot$ serves as an exceptionally sensitive and selective probe of magnetic and density-wave orders, exhibiting pronounced anomalies, whereas only weak signatures are observed in $ρ_\parallel$. Our results highlight interlayer coherence as a key organizing parameter that both tracks the relevant magnetic correlations and is closely tied to superconductivity, providing stringent constraints on microscopic theories of high-$T_c$ superconductivity in nickelates.

AI.tldr: 本文通过高精度六端直流输运测量，揭示了双层和三层Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐中强本征电子各向异性，发现层间输运存在从相干到不相干的普适交叉行为，且超导转变温度与环境压力下的电阻率各向异性呈负相关，表明层间电子相干性是镍酸盐高温超导的关键组织参数。
AI.motivation: Ruddlesden-Popper（RP）镍酸盐中电子维度对磁性和超导电性的影响尚未明确，现有研究存在争议。
AI.method: 采用六端几何构型对高质量双层和三层RP镍酸盐单晶进行晶体学轴分辨的直流输运测量，自洽地确定面内（ρ∥）和面外（ρ⊥）本征电阻率，最小化高各向异性导体中电流重分布带来的不确定性。
AI.result: 发现强本征电子各向异性（与常规四探针测量的弱各向异性相反）；ρ⊥呈现非单调温度依赖，揭示层间输运从相干到不相干的普适交叉；超导转变温度Tc与常压电阻率各向异性负相关；ρ⊥对磁性和密度波序的探测异常灵敏，而ρ∥仅显示微弱信号。
AI.conclusion: 层间相干性是追踪磁关联并与超导电性紧密相关的关键组织参数，为镍酸盐高温超导的微观理论提供了严格约束。

title: Kapitza-like modulation of near-field radiative heat transfer
summary: We introduce a Kapitza-like mechanism for the near-field radiative heat transfer and show that fast modulation of any parameter controlling the flux, such as the vacuum gap or a material response, produces a quadratic, time-averaged correction in the slow thermal dynamics. This correction splits into a frequency-independent static term and a low-pass dynamical term, yielding sizable modulation-induced temperature shifts and modified effective thermal conductances that can stabilize or destabilize the steady state. Applying the theory to gap modulation between SiC slabs, we derive analytical scaling laws and predict temperature shifts that are fully measurable with existing experimental platforms, requiring only readily accessible low modulation frequencies of order $Ω\approx 10^4~\mathrm{rad/s}$. Our results establish a thermal analogue of the Kapitza mechanism and provide a general route for controlling radiative heat flow in micro- and nanoscale platforms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种近场辐射传热的Kapitza-like机制，通过快速调制真空间隙或材料响应等参数，在慢热动力学中产生二次时间平均修正。该修正分为频率无关的静态项和低通动态项，可产生显著的调制诱导温度偏移和修改的有效热导，从而稳定或失稳稳态。应用于SiC板之间的间隙调制，推导了解析标度律并预测了温度偏移，在现有实验平台上完全可测。这一结果建立了热学中的Kapitza机制类比，为微纳尺度平台控制辐射热流提供了通用途径。
AI.motivation: 探索近场辐射传热中通过快速参数调制产生类似Kapitza机制的二次时间平均效应，以提供一种控制微纳尺度辐射热流的新途径。
AI.method: 理论推导了快速调制任意控制参数（如真空间隙或材料响应）在慢热动力学中产生二次时间平均修正的框架，并将修正分解为频率无关静态项和低通动态项。以SiC板之间的间隙调制为例进行应用分析，推导了解析标度律。
AI.result: 发现了调制诱导的温度偏移和修改的有效热导，可以稳定或失稳稳态。对于SiC板间隙调制，预测的温度偏移在现有实验平台上完全可测，且仅需约Ω≈10^4 rad/s的低调制频率。
AI.conclusion: 建立了热学中的Kapitza机制类比，为通过快速参数调制控制微纳尺度辐射热流提供了通用理论框架和实验可行的方案。

title: Theory of melting lines with a variable enthalpy of fusion
summary: Conventional derivations of phase boundaries from the Clausius-Clapeyron (CC) relation often employ the constant latent heat approximation to maintain analytical functions of the sublimation and boiling curves. To address the complex thermodynamics of the solid-liquid transition, we develop a two-phase analytical model by modifying the CC equation to account for a variable enthalpy of fusion along the melting line (ML). Our methodology utilizes recent theoretical and experimental progress demonstrating that the isobaric heat capacity of crystalline solids near the melting point features a dominant anharmonic, volume-dependent component. Consequently, the latent heat is correlated to the specific volumes of the coexisting phases. Differentiation of this modified CC relation yields a second-order differential equation governing ML. By imposing appropriate e boundary conditions, physically acceptable approximate parabolic solutions are derived. The parameters of these analytic functions are defined exclusively by fundamental thermophysical properties, including the bulk moduli, thermal expansion coefficients, and specific volumes of the coexisting phases, as well as the isobaric heat capacity of the solid. Our derivation, rooted in solid-state anharmonicity, yields approximate parabolic scaling laws that corroborate with a recent universal model derived from the Phonon Theory of Liquids [K. Trachenko, Phys. Rev. E 109, 034122 (2024)], supporting the universal parabolic nature of melting curves from a completely distinct theoretical foundation.

AI.tldr: 本文通过修正Clausius-Clapeyron方程，考虑固态非简谐性导致的变熔融焓，推导出熔融线的近似抛物线标度律，与Phonon Theory of Liquids的普适抛物线模型在完全不同理论基础上相互印证。
AI.motivation: 传统Clausius-Clapeyron关系推导相界时常用常潜热近似，固液相变的复杂热力学难以精确描述，亟需更完善的解析模型。
AI.method: 修改CC方程引入变熔融焓，利用固态等压热容的非简谐体积依赖成分建立潜热与共存相比容的关联；对修正CC关系求导得到二阶微分方程，施加边界条件得到抛物线近似解。
AI.result: 得到由基础热物性参数（体模量、热膨胀系数、比容、等压热容）唯一定义的近似抛物线解析解，与Trachenko的Phonon Theory普适抛物线模型吻合。
AI.conclusion: 从固态非简谐性这一完全不同的理论基础出发，支持了熔融曲线具有普适抛物线性质的结论。

title: Qumus: Realization of An Embodied AI Quantum Material Experimentalist
comment: 29 Pages in total. Supplementary Demo Videos are available at https://qumus.ai
summary: While modern Large Language Models (LLMs) and agentic artificial intelligence (AI) have demonstrated transformative capabilities in digital domains, the realization of embodied AI capable of real-world scientific discovery remains a difficult frontier. The advancements are hindered by the inherent complexity of integrating high-level reasoning, multimodal information processing and real-time physical execution. Here we introduce Qumus, the first AI quantum materials experimentalist. Physically embodied within a robotic mini-laboratory, Qumus is an intelligent, multimodal, and multi-agent system designed for the creation and nano-processing of atomically thin two-dimensional (2D) materials and stacked van der Waals (vdW) structures. Qumus autonomously navigates the full scientific cycle, from hypothesis generation and protocol planning to multi-step experimental execution, result analysis and reporting, acting as an experimentalist. Markedly, the system has achieved, for the first time, the AI-creation of graphene, as well as the first AI-fabrication of complex nanodevices including atomically thin field-effect transistors via vdW stacking. Qumus excels at these tasks by demonstrating autonomous error correction and closed-loop experimentation. Our results establish a generalizable framework for self-improving embodied AI systems that learn directly from the quantum world, opening a pathway toward accelerated discovery in quantum materials, electronics and beyond.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Qumus——首个AI量子材料实验系统，它是一个具身化、多智能体的机器人微型实验室，能够自主完成从假设生成到实验执行、结果分析的完整科学发现周期，并首次实现了AI自主制备石墨烯和原子级薄场效应晶体管等纳米器件。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM和智能体AI在数字领域表现优异，但实现能够进行真实世界科学发现的具身AI仍面临巨大挑战，主要瓶颈在于高层推理、多模态信息处理与实时物理执行之间的复杂集成。
AI.method: Qumus是一个物理具身化的机器人微型实验室，采用多智能体系统架构，具备多模态感知能力，能够自主完成假设生成、实验方案规划、多步实验执行、结果分析和报告撰写，并具备自主纠错和闭环实验能力。
AI.result: 首次实现AI自主制备石墨烯，首次实现AI自主通过范德华堆叠制造原子级薄场效应晶体管等复杂纳米器件，并展示了自主纠错和闭环实验能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了一个通用化的自改进具身AI系统框架，该系统可直接从量子世界学习，为加速量子材料、电子学等领域的科学发现开辟了新路径。

title: Anomalous thermal and elastic properties of an epitaxial NiTi film exhibiting R-phase
summary: Shape memory alloys like NiTi are at the core of emerging thermal management applications, including elastocaloric refrigeration, thermoelastic harvesting, and latent heat storage. Most of these applications benefit from a small scale due to the accelerated heat exchange, but obtaining precise functional properties of films is challenging. Here we demonstrate that transient grating spectroscopy (TGS) enables characterization of elastic coefficients and thermal diffusivity of a 3 $μ$m thick epitaxial NiTi film during a thermally induced phase transformation. The in-situ measurement of a complete austenite$\rightarrow$R-phase$\rightarrow$martensite$\rightarrow$austenite temperature cycle reveals that the elastic properties exhibit a crossover of the shear moduli (from $c^\prime < c_{44}$ in austenite to $c^\prime > c_{44}$ in martensite) and that the thermal diffusivity changes by 450 $\%$ between the R-phase and austenite. This dramatic change, together with the absence of hysteresis between the R-phase and austenite, makes NiTi a promising material candidate for thermal switches. The results indicate that the change in thermal diffusivity originates from an anomalous heat capacity of the R-phase. Furthermore, our TGS study provides temperature-dependent thermal and elastic properties required for simulating thermal management microsystems using this material.

AI.tldr: 本文利用瞬态光栅光谱（TGS）技术表征了3 μm厚NiTi外延薄膜在热诱导相变过程中的弹性系数和热扩散率，发现剪切模量在奥氏体和马氏体间发生交叉，R相与奥氏体间热扩散率变化达450%，且无滞后，使NiTi成为热开关的理想候选材料。
AI.motivation: 形状记忆合金（如NiTi）在热管理应用中（如弹性卡冷、热释电能量收集、潜热储存）具有前景，但薄膜尺度的精确功能特性表征存在挑战，需要开发有效的原位表征方法。
AI.method: 采用瞬态光栅光谱（TGS）技术对3 μm厚外延NiTi薄膜进行原位测量，覆盖完整的热诱导相变循环（奥氏体→R相→马氏体→奥氏体）。
AI.result: (1) 弹性性质呈现剪切模量交叉：奥氏体中c′ < c₄₄，马氏体中c′ > c₄₄；(2) 热扩散率在R相与奥氏体之间变化达450%；(3) R相与奥氏体之间无热滞现象。
AI.conclusion: 热扩散率的剧烈变化及无滞后特性使NiTi成为热开关的理想材料；热扩散率变化源于R相的异常热容；TGS提供的温变热学和弹性参数可用于热管理微系统的模拟。

title: Universal interface fluctuations in absorbing-state phase transitions
summary: Despite similarities between models exhibiting absorbing phase transitions (APTs) and those showing Kardar-Parisi-Zhang (KPZ) growth, the relationship between these universal fluctuations has remained elusive. We numerically study (1+1)-dimensional interfaces of (2+1)-dimensional models showing APTs of directed percolation (DP) and compact directed percolation (CDP) classes with an active boundary, finding a universal crossover from short-time APT-governed fluctuations to long-time KPZ fluctuations. Upon rescaling time and length by the APT correlation time and length, the cumulants of the interface height distributions collapse onto a single scaling function. The fluctuation properties of the discrete Domany-Kinzel model and the continuum stochastic Fisher-Kolmogorov-Petrovsky-Piskunov (sFKPP) equation coincide, indicating that the KPZ growth parameters are determined solely by fundamental properties of the APT. For the CDP sFKPP equation, a dimensionless parameter tunes both the critical interface distribution and the KPZ parameters, with the interface properties of the biased voter model recovered in a limiting case. These results uncover a universal crossover in which KPZ fluctuations emerge from APT fluctuations at long times, linking paradigmatic universality classes of nonequilibrium scale-invariant phenomena.

AI.tldr: 本文通过数值研究(2+1)维具有活性边界的定向渗流(DP)和紧致定向渗流(CDP)类模型的(1+1)维界面，发现从短时吸收相变(APT)涨落到长时Kardar-Parisi-Zhang (KPZ)涨落的普适交叉行为，揭示了这两类非平衡标度不变现象普适类之间的内在联系。
AI.motivation: 尽管展现吸收相变(APT)的模型与Kardar-Parisi-Zhang (KPZ)生长模型在行为上具有相似性，但这两种普适涨落之间的关系长期以来一直未被阐明。
AI.method: 对(2+1)维DP和CDP类APT模型进行数值模拟，研究其(1+1)维活性边界的界面演化；通过APT关联时间和长度重新标度时间和长度，分析界面高度分布的累积量；对比离散Domany-Kinzel模型与连续随机Fisher-Kolmogorov-Petrovsky-Piskunov (sFKPP)方程的涨落特性。
AI.result: 发现从短时间APT主导的涨落到长时间KPZ涨落的普适交叉；重标度后累积量塌缩到单一标度函数；离散与连续模型的结果一致，表明KPZ生长参数仅由APT的基本性质决定；对于CDP sFKPP方程，一个无量纲参数同时调节临界界面分布和KPZ参数。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了APT涨落在长时间下涌现出KPZ涨落的普适交叉机制，将非平衡标度不变现象中的两个范例性普适类联系起来。

title: Spin and orbital mixing of edge states in a quantum Hall system proximitized by a superconductor
summary: We investigate the formation and transport properties of chiral Andreev edge states in a two-dimensional quantum Hall system proximitized by a superconductor. By numerically modeling the system using the Bogoliubov-de Gennes equations, we analyze the non-local conductance and transmission probabilities of multimode and spinful systems. We demonstrate that the Andreev reflection process induces a mixing of the quantum Hall edge modes at higher filling factors, a phenomenon strictly prohibited in clean, purely electronic systems. When incorporating the Zeeman interaction, we show that the Andreev edge states split into uncoupled spin species, maintaining spin orthogonality that prevents mixing between opposite spin sectors. Furthermore, we explore the impact of Rashba spin-orbit coupling. While the spin-orbit interaction alone causes slight spin depolarization, its combination with an in-plane magnetic field drives complex spin mixing among all chiral Andreev bands, fundamentally altering the conductance oscillations. Finally, we reveal that the electron transmission probabilities exhibit robust degeneracies, which emerge as a direct consequence of the unitarity constraints and the particle-hole symmetry of the system's scattering matrix in a magnetic field and the presence of spin-orbit interaction.

AI.tldr: 本文通过数值模拟研究二维量子霍尔系统与超导体邻近化时形成的手性安德烈夫边缘态，分析了多模及自旋系统中的非局域电导与透射概率，揭示了安德烈夫反射导致的边缘模混合、塞曼分裂、自旋轨道耦合效应以及由幺正性和粒子-空穴对称性产生的电子透射概率简并。
AI.motivation: 探索超导体邻近化量子霍尔系统中手性安德烈夫边缘态的形成与输运性质，特别是多模和自旋系统中的非局域电导行为，以及各种相互作用（塞曼、自旋轨道耦合）对边缘态的影响。
AI.method: 利用Bogoliubov-de Gennes方程对系统进行数值建模，分析多模、自旋系统的非局域电导和透射概率。
AI.result: 1) 安德烈夫反射引起高填充因子下量子霍尔边缘模的混合，这在纯电子系统中被严格禁止；2) 塞曼相互作用使安德烈夫边缘态分裂为不耦合的自旋物种，保持自旋正交性；3) 自旋轨道耦合单独作用导致轻微自旋退极化，但与面内磁场结合则引发复杂的自旋混合；4) 电子透射概率在幺正性和粒子-空穴对称性约束下呈现稳健的简并性。
AI.conclusion: 手性安德烈夫边缘态在超导体-量子霍尔混合系统中展现出丰富的物理现象，如边缘模混合、自旋分裂与混合，以及由基本对称性导致的透射概率简并，为相关量子输运研究提供了新的视角。

title: Microstructure evolution during rapid solidification of hypoeutectic Al-Ag alloys near absolute stability
summary: Microsegregation-free microstructures can form by solidifying at velocities beyond the absolute stability limit ($V_{\text{abs}}$), where solute partitioning is suppressed by a stable, planar solid-liquid interface. Producing such microstructures is of considerable practical interest; however, $V_{\text{abs}}$ typically exceeds the ${\sim}1$ m/s growth rates encountered in additive manufacturing (AM). Here we demonstrate the absolute stability limit can be reached in sufficiently concentrated hypoeutectic Al-Ag alloys at growth rates well below the 1~m/s typically encountered in additive manufacturing. Dynamic Transmission Electron Microscopy (DTEM) of rapid solidification front evolution -- following laser spot melting of Al-Ag thin films -- combined with postmortem microstructural characterization, enables detailed quantitative comparison with both phase-field (PF) simulations and a sharp-interface linear stability analysis that uses a non-equilibrium, velocity-dependent phase diagram extracted from the PF model. The analysis predicts that $V_{\text{abs}}$ follows a trend similar to that of the miscibility gap, first increasing and then decreasing with Ag concentration. Predicted values of $V_{\text{abs}}$ are in good quantitative agreement with PF simulations over the entire hypoeutectic concentration range and with experiments for three concentrated alloys. These results inform the prediction and control of microstructural development in concentrated alloys near the absolute stability limit under AM conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验、相场模拟和理论分析，证明了在足够浓的Al-Ag过共晶合金中，可以在远低于增材制造典型生长速率（~1 m/s）的条件下达到绝对稳定极限，形成无显微偏析的微观组织。
AI.motivation: 实现无显微偏析的微观组织具有重要实用价值，但绝对稳定极限所需速度通常超过增材制造中约1 m/s的生长速率，限制其实际应用。
AI.method: 采用动态透射电子显微镜（DTEM）观察激光点熔Al-Ag薄膜的快速凝固前沿演变，结合事后微观结构表征，并与相场（PF）模拟及基于非平衡速度相关相图的尖界面线性稳定性分析进行定量比较。
AI.result: 绝对稳定极限速度V_abs随Ag浓度先增加后减小，与混溶隙趋势相似。预测值与相场模拟在整个过共晶浓度范围内定量一致，并与三种浓合金的实验结果吻合。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果可为增材制造条件下近绝对稳定极限浓合金的微观组织预测与控制提供指导。

title: Network analysis for steady-state current fluctuations under finite affinity: Application to Brownian computation
comment: 12 pages, 4 figures, ancillary Mathematica notebook provided as supplemental material
summary: A graph-theoretic analysis of the steady-state current noise in master equations under a finite thermodynamic force (affinity) is presented. The incidence matrix twisted by a finite affinity is not orthogonal to the standard cycle space, motivating the introduction of twisted circuit matrices to restore the orthogonality. The resulting twisted-cycle matrix yields an interference-like effect, enabling us to express the signal-to-noise ratio as a quadratic optimization problem in terms of twisted-cycle currents. We apply this framework to a Brownian computation model on a tree-like state-transition diagram with exponential backward branching, finite affinity at each step, and a single reset cycle. In the limit of an infinitely long intended computation path $\ell$, the Fano factor of the reset current undergoes a transition from noiseless to Poissonian behavior at an affinity equal to the logarithm of the number of immediate predecessors $α$. This corresponds to an easy-hard transition in the computational time complexity [K. Okajima, K. Hukushima, arXiv:2512.24728 ], which is not captured by the thermodynamic uncertainty relation. This transition point precisely characterizes the thermodynamic costs of logically irreversible computation: in the absence of affinity, the reset cost scales as $\ln \ell$, whereas reaching the transition point requires a thermodynamic force of order $\ln α$ per step to counteract backward branching.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种扭曲电路分析框架，用于研究有限热力学力下主方程稳态电流噪声，并将其应用于树状布朗计算模型，发现在无限长计算路径极限下，复位电流的Fano因子在亲和力等于前驱数对数时发生从无噪声到泊松行为的转变，对应计算复杂性的易-难相变。
AI.motivation: 传统图论分析中，有限亲和力扭曲的关联矩阵与标准循环空间不正交，现有方法无法准确描述有限热力学力下的电流噪声特性。
AI.method: 引入扭曲电路矩阵恢复正交性；利用扭曲循环矩阵的干涉效应将信噪比表达为扭曲循环电流的二次优化问题；应用于树状布朗计算模型。
AI.result: 无限长计算路径下，复位电流Fano因子在亲和力等于log(α)时发生无噪声到泊松行为的转变；无亲和力时复位成本随ln ℓ增长，达到转变点需每步log α量级的热力学力。
AI.conclusion: 该转变点精确刻画了逻辑不可逆计算的热力学成本，且不被热力学不确定性关系所捕捉。

title: Spin-caloritronic signatures of soft magnons in bilayer CrSBr
summary: Spin transport in magnetic insulators is often treated by assuming that magnons carry a fixed spin angular momentum of $\hbar$, which does not hold in general, however. Here we calculate the magnon spin angular momentum of a layered antiferromagnet as a function of applied magnetic field and wave vector. We show that the triaxial anisotropy and intralayer dipolar interactions in bilayer CrSBr renormalize the magnon spin angular momentum, which diverges upon field-induced magnon softening. This divergence gives rise to a pronounced peak in the thermal spin Seebeck response and provides a clear spin-caloritronic signature of soft magnons.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了层状反铁磁体CrSBr中磁振子自旋角动量在外加磁场和波矢下的行为，发现三轴各向异性和层内偶极相互作用会重整化磁振子自旋角动量，导致其在磁场诱导磁振子软化时发散，并引发热自旋Seebeck响应的显著峰值，为软磁振子提供了清晰的自旋量热学特征。
AI.motivation: 传统观点假设磁振子携带固定的自旋角动量ħ，但这一假设在一般情况下并不成立。作者旨在计算层状反铁磁体中磁振子自旋角动量的实际行为，揭示其偏离固定值的原因及物理后果。
AI.method: 作者以双层CrSBr为模型体系，计算了在外加磁场和波矢变化下磁振子自旋角动量的变化，考虑了**三轴各向异性**和**层内偶极相互作用**对磁振子自旋角动量的重整化效应。
AI.result: 磁振子自旋角动量在磁场诱导的**磁振子软化**（软模）附近出现**发散**行为，这进一步导致了**热自旋Seebeck响应**中出现一个显著的峰值。
AI.conclusion: 磁振子自旋角动量的发散为**软磁振子**的存在提供了一个清晰的**自旋量热学**（spin-caloritronic）特征信号，深化了对反铁磁体系中自旋输运和热-自旋转换机制的理解。

title: A comparative first-principles investigation of bilayer NbOX2 (X=Cl, Br, I) for Photocatalytic water splitting applications
summary: Motivated by our previous work on bulk NbOX2 , where we have reported its high 1dielectric polarisation and finite piezoelectric response, this work extends to its 2D homo bilayer system to explore its potential for photocatalytic water splitting. Herein, density functional theory (DFT) were employed in probing the structural, electronic, optical, and photocatalytic properties of 2D homo bilayer NbOX2 (X = Cl, Br, and I). Our results show that structurally, NbOCl2 and NbOBr2 prefer AC bilayer stacking,while AB stacking was preferred by NbOI2 . All the considered bilayers are dynamically, thermally, and mechanically stable. From the analysis of electronic structure we have found a decreasing trend in the energy band gap as X goes down the group from Cl to I, with the position of the valence band maximum shifting upward along the high symmetry points. In terms of carrier mobility, all 2D bilayer systems possess high carrier mobility comparable to known 2D materials. It also exhibits an anisotropic carrier transfer property by which charge carriers are separated efficiently. These materials show similar trends to BiOI and PtSe2 , in which photocatalytic efficiency was increased by forming the multiple layers. The materials under investigation are suitable for photocatalytic water splitting under visible and ultraviolet regions with absorption coefficients of 105 cm-1.

AI.tldr: 本文利用密度泛函理论(DFT)研究了二维同质双层NbOX2 (X=Cl, Br, I)的结构、电子、光学和光催化性能，发现这些材料具有高载流子迁移率、各向异性电荷传输特性，且在可见光和紫外光区具有105 cm-1的吸收系数，适合用于光催化水分解。
AI.motivation: 基于前期对块体NbOX2高介电极化和有限压电响应的研究，本文将其拓展至二维同质双层体系，探索其在光催化水分解方面的潜力。
AI.method: 采用密度泛函理论(DFT)计算，对二维同质双层NbOX2 (X=Cl, Br, I)的结构、电子、光学和光催化性质进行了系统研究。
AI.result: (1) NbOCl2和NbOBr2偏好AC双层堆叠，NbOI2偏好AB堆叠，所有双层结构均具有动力学、热学和力学稳定性；(2) 从Cl到I，能带隙逐渐减小，价带顶沿高对称点向上移动；(3) 所有体系具有高载流子迁移率，表现出各向异性电荷传输特性；(4) 在可见光和紫外光区吸收系数达105 cm-1，适合光催化水分解。
AI.conclusion: 二维双层NbOX2体系与BiOI和PtSe2类似，通过形成多层结构提升了光催化效率，是可见-紫外光区光催化水分解的潜在候选材料。

title: Global resetting and emergent correlations: exit statistics in an interval
summary: There is considerable current interest in the emergence of statistical correlations within a population of otherwise non-interacting Brownian particles subject to a common fluctuating environment or drive. Examples include global stochastic resetting, switching confining potentials, fluctuating diffusivities, and stochastically gated boundaries. Most studies have focused on the analytical structure of the stationary joint probability density (assuming it exists). In this paper, we extend previous work on the exit statistics of multiple particles in stochastically gated domains to the case of global resetting in an interval with absorbing boundaries at both ends. First, we use a generalised Itô's lemma to derive a hierarchy of boundary value problems (BVPs) for the joint splitting probability that all particles exit from the same end of the interval. The BVPs form a nested sequence with respect to the initial number of particles $M$. We explicitly solve the BVP for a pair of particles ($M=2$) and use this to illustrate the emergence of pairwise correlations. Second, we show how the BVP for the splitting probability of $M$ Brownian particles can be mapped onto the $M$th order moment equation of a stochastic diffusion equation with resetting. We thus establish a general mathematical framework to study exit problems for globally-driven particle systems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究全局随机重置下多个布朗粒子在吸收边界区间内的出射统计，推导了联合分裂概率的边界值问题层次结构，揭示了粒子对之间的相关性，并建立了与随机扩散方程矩方程的联系。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注非相互作用布朗粒子在共同涨落环境（如随机重置、切换势阱、随机门控边界）下的平稳联合概率密度。本文旨在将先前关于随机门控域中多粒子出射统计的工作推广到全局重置情形，并建立更一般的理论框架。
AI.method: 利用广义Itô引理推导联合分裂概率的边界值问题（BVP）层次结构，该结构关于初始粒子数M形成嵌套序列；显式求解M=2的BVP以展示成对相关性；将M粒子的BVP映射到随机扩散方程（带重置）的M阶矩方程。
AI.result: 成功求解了双粒子（M=2）的联合分裂概率，揭示了全局重置下粒子间统计相关性的涌现；建立了M粒子出射问题与随机扩散方程矩方程之间的数学映射关系。
AI.conclusion: 本文为研究全局驱动粒子系统中的出射问题提供了一个通用的数学框架，展示了非相互作用粒子如何通过共同环境产生有效相关性，对理解复杂系统中的集体行为有重要意义。

title: Probing Dielectric Screening in van der Waals Heterostructures via Pressure-Tuned Exciton Rydberg Series
summary: Excitons in two-dimensional semiconductors are directly exposed to the environment and are sensitive to the dielectric properties of their surrounding. Here, we show that the Rydberg series of excited states of excitons in a monolayer WSe$_2$ encapsulated in hexagonal boron nitride (hBN) can be used to probe the pressure-induced modifications of the surrounding dielectric properties. We propose a model based on the pressure induced evolution of the interlayer distances in this van der Waals heterostructure and on the bulk dielectric properties of hBN. This approach allows a direct measurement of the dielectric constant of pressurized hBN and establishes a new methodology for dielectric sensing.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了单层WSe₂中激子的里德伯系列激发态可用于探测六方氮化硼（hBN）封装层在压力作用下介电性质的变化，建立了基于压力诱导层间距变化和hBN体介电性质的模型，实现了对高压下hBN介电常数的直接测量，提出了一种新的介电传感方法。
AI.motivation: 二维半导体中的激子对其周围环境的介电性质非常敏感，因此可以利用这一特性来探测周围介电材料的性质变化，尤其是压力诱导下的介电性质改性。
AI.method: 利用单层WSe₂中激子的里德伯系列激发态作为探针，结合基于压力诱导范德华异质结构中层间距演变以及hBN体介电性质的理论模型，对封装材料hBN的介电常数进行测量。
AI.result: 成功实现了对高压条件下hBN介电常数的直接测量，验证了激子里德伯系列可作为介电传感的敏感探针。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了基于激子激发态探测周围介电性质变化的新方法，为介电传感领域提供了一种全新的技术路径。

title: Finite-width adiabatic shear banding and dislocation patterning in mesoscale polycrystalline aggregates
summary: Dynamic shear banding under adiabatic conditions in a mesoscale polycrystalline aggregate is studied using a model of mesoscale dislocation mechanics and experiments. The model involves a length scale related to hardening induced by excess/polar/geometrically necessary dislocation (GND) density, and utilizes a simple classical crystal plasticity model with isotropic Voce law hardening. Simulations of statistically representative volume elements of a polycrystal determined from experimental samples are conducted. Studies in 2-d (section) and 3-d capture the experimentally observed finite-width shear bands and the formation of low-angle subgrain boundaries even in the absence of heat conduction in the model, as well as size-dependent strengthening for grain sizes from 1 to 20 $μ$m. The 2-d and large-scale 3-d simulations, the latter involving 1 million finite elements, provide access to the progressive evolution of material strength, stress state, and temperature in the course of large deformations. GND distributions accumulate at grain boundaries and form patterned structures within grain interiors, offering insight into the microstructural changes that precede failure in adiabatic shear bands. Mesh-converged, delocalized and localized plastic flow to very large deformations without softening is observed for a significant range of parameters, reflecting a competition between GND hardening and thermal softening in setting the non-softening steady state in the absence of other ductile damage mechanisms in the model.

AI.tldr: 本文利用介观位错力学模型和实验，研究了多晶集合体在绝热条件下的动态剪切带形成。模型结合几何必要位错（GND）密度引起的硬化与经典晶体塑性理论，在2D和3D模拟中成功捕捉了有限宽度剪切带、低角度亚晶界形成以及晶粒尺寸强化效应，揭示了GND硬化与热软化之间的竞争机制。
AI.motivation: 理解绝热剪切带形成机制，特别是位错介观尺度上的微观结构演化对材料失效前行为的影响，并通过模型揭示GND硬化与热软化的相互作用。
AI.method: 采用介观位错力学模型，结合GND密度相关的长度尺度硬化与经典晶体塑性（Voce硬化律）。对实验样品的统计代表性体积单元进行2D截面和3D大规模有限元模拟（高达100万单元），在无热传导条件下进行研究。
AI.result: 成功再现了有限宽度剪切带和低角度亚晶界形成；观察到1-20μm晶粒尺寸的尺寸强化效应；GND在晶界积累并形成晶粒内部图案化结构；在无软化情况下实现网格收敛的局部/非局部塑性流动。
AI.conclusion: GND硬化与热软化的竞争决定了绝热剪切带中非软化稳态的形成；模型在不引入热传导和损伤机制的情况下即可描述剪切带的关键微观结构特征。

title: Quantum Mpemba effect for operators in open systems
summary: The quantum Mpemba effect concerns with anomalous relaxation of quantum states that evolves either under unitary or non-unitary dynamics. In the context of open quantum systems, while most studies focus on quantum states evolving under completely positive trace-presing dynamics described by the Gorini-Kossakowski-Sudarshan-Lindblad (GKSL) master equation, we demonstrate that an analogous effect can arise at the level of operators. In particular, we show that operators that evolves under the adjoint Liouvillian -- despite not being a trace-preserving map -- can still exhibit a genuine Mpemba effect. We derive general conditions under which this phenomenon can occur and validate our predictions for three different open quantum setups. Our results broaden the scope of the Mpemba effect in quantum systems and provide a framework for controlling the relaxation of physically relevant observables.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了开放量子系统中的量子Mpemba效应，发现该效应不仅存在于量子态，也能在算子层面出现。即使算子在伴随Liouvillian下演化（非迹保持映射），仍可表现出Mpemba效应。作者推导了该现象发生的普适条件，并在三种不同开放量子系统中验证了预言。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注量子态在完全正迹保持（GKSL）主方程下的Mpemba效应，本文旨在探索该效应是否能在算子层面（伴随Liouvillian演化下）出现，拓宽其适用范围。
AI.method: 1) 理论推导——给出算子层面Mpemba效应发生的普适条件；2) 数值验证——在三种不同的开放量子系统设置中检验理论预言。
AI.result: 算子即使在非迹保持的伴随Liouvillian演化下，也能展现真正的Mpemba效应；在三种不同开放量子系统中均验证了该现象的存在。
AI.conclusion: 该工作扩展了量子Mpemba效应的适用范围，并为控制物理可观测量（算子）的弛豫行为提供了理论框架。

title: Effect of electric current on optical response of viscous electron-hole plasma
summary: The influence of the Hall voltage on the photoluminescence of a dense hydrodynamic electron-hole plasma laser generated in a mesoscopic n-doped GaAs channel under intense laser excitation is studied. Laser excitation induces an interband current determined by the recombination of photogenerated electron-hole pairs. As a result, background electrons drifting under the influence of the Hall voltage form an effective Hall current. The Coulomb drag caused by the Hall current causes the accumulation of light holes, leading to the appearance of a double photoluminescence line formed by the recombination of excitons and trions. In contrast, in the absence of a Hall current, the shift in the photoluminescence energy associated with heavy holes occurs due to the electric field created by the Hall potential difference.

AI.tldr: 研究发现在强激光激发下，n掺杂GaAs通道中霍尔电压会诱导光致发光出现双线结构（激子和三子复合），而霍尔电流的缺失则会导致重空穴相关的光致发光能量位移。
AI.motivation: 探究霍尔电压对致密 hydrodynamic 电子-空穴等离子体激光的光致发光特性的影响，特别是在介观尺度n掺杂GaAs通道中的表现。
AI.method: 在强激光激发下，利用霍尔电压诱导的库仑拖曳效应，观察背景电子漂移形成的有效霍尔电流对光致发光谱线的影响。
AI.result: 霍尔电流存在时，库仑拖曳导致轻空穴积累，出现由激子和三子复合形成的双光致发光线；无霍尔电流时，霍尔电势差产生的电场导致重空穴相关光致发光能量位移。
AI.conclusion: 霍尔电压和霍尔电流对光致发光特性有显著不同的影响，分别通过库仑拖曳和电场机制调控电子-空穴等离子体的复合行为。

title: Ferroelectric polarization controlled orbital Hall conductivity in a higher-order topological insulator: \textit{d1T}-phase monolayer MoS$_2$
summary: The higher-order topological insulator is an extended concept of the conventional topological insulator, which obeys the generalization of the standard bulk-boundary correspondence. In our paper, we predict the monolayer \textit{d1T}-phase transition metal dichalcogenide MoS$_2$ to be a higher-order topological insulator, while also possessing intriguing ferroelectric characteristics. We explicitly demonstrate the nontrivial topological index and reveal the hallmark corner states with quantized fractional charge within the bulk band gap. Second, we show the existence of a nonzero orbital Hall conductivity plateau within the energy gap which is a signature to identify higher-order topology system. Additionally, we investigate the relationship between the ferroelectricity and the orbital Hall conductivity of \textit{d1T} MoS$_2$ and find that the direction of ferroelectric polarization can modulate the positive and negative values of the orbital Hall conductivity $σ_{\rm{OH}}^x$. Our findings provide the theory and material candidate for ferroelectricity tunable orbital Hall effect which is promising to realize the external electric field controllable orbitronics.

AI.tldr: 本文预测单层d1T相MoS₂为高阶拓扑绝缘体，同时具有铁电特性，并发现铁电极化方向可调控轨道霍尔电导的正负值，为外电场可控的轨道电子学提供了理论和材料候选。
AI.motivation: 高阶拓扑绝缘体是传统拓扑绝缘体的扩展概念，但目前缺乏同时具有高阶拓扑和铁电特性的具体材料候选，本文旨在寻找这类材料并探索铁电性与轨道霍尔效应的关联。
AI.method: 通过理论计算证明单层d1T-MoS₂的非平凡拓扑指标，展示体带隙内的角态和量子化分数电荷；计算轨道霍尔电导平台；研究铁电极化方向与轨道霍尔电导的关系。
AI.result: 证实d1T-MoS₂为高阶拓扑绝缘体，存在标志性的角态和分数电荷；发现能隙内存在非零的轨道霍尔电导平台；铁电极化方向可调制轨道霍尔电导σ_{OH}^x的正负值。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为铁电性可调谐的轨道霍尔效应提供了理论和材料候选，有望实现外电场可控的轨道电子学器件。

title: Entropy additivity from exponential decay of correlations: a coarse-grained operator approach
summary: Thermodynamic extensivity is commonly introduced as a postulate -- the homogeneity of degree one in thermodynamic potentials. We provide a constructive derivation of this property from microscopic conditions on the pair potential, without assuming it. Working with the one- and two-particle reduced densities of the $N$-body canonical Gibbs state, we introduce a combined coarse-graining operator $\mathcal{C}$ on single-particle phase space $\mathcal{M}=Λ\times\mathbb{R}^3$, producing dimensionless mesoscopic probabilities over spatial--momentum cells $\{V_i\timesΠ_α\}$. Under three conditions on the pair potential -- stability, temperedness, and exponential cluster decomposition with correlation length $ξ$ -- we show, using the Ursell cluster expansion, that the coarse-grained entropy satisfies \[S_{\mathrm{CG}}=\sum_i S_i+O\!\left(\frac{|Λ|}{\ell^d}e^{-\ell/ξ}\right),\] where $\ell\ggξ$ is the cell diameter. The correction is exponentially suppressed per cell, making entropy additive and recovering the thermodynamic limit of Ruelle and Fisher in explicit operator language. For systems with long-range interactions, where temperedness fails, the correction does not vanish, and non-additivity is quantified through inter-cell mutual information. We further show that spatial averaging does not commute with nonlinear thermodynamic functionals such as the entropy density -- a thermodynamic analogue of the cosmological averaging problem -- and we derive the generalised Euler relation with explicit surface corrections.

AI.tldr: 本文从微观粒子间相互作用势的条件出发，推导了热力学广延性（热力学势的一阶齐次性），利用Ursell簇展开和粗粒化操作，证明在稳定性、温和性及指数簇分解条件下，粗粒熵是渐近可加的，并揭示了长程相互作用下非广延性的信息论来源。
AI.motivation: 热力学广延性通常作为公设引入，但缺乏从微观动力学出发的严格推导。作者试图填补这一空白，给出广延性的构造性证明。
AI.method: 引入单粒子相空间上的粗粒化算符，将N体正则吉布斯态约化为一粒子和两粒子约化密度，利用Ursell簇展开，在三种微观条件（稳定性、温和性、指数簇分解）下导出粗粒熵的可加性及指数小修正项。
AI.result: 粗粒熵满足S_CG = Σ_i S_i + O(|Λ|/ℓ^d e^{-ℓ/ξ})，修正项被指数抑制，恢复了Ruelle-Fisher热力学极限。长程相互作用下修正不消失，非广延性可通过单元间互信息量化。
AI.conclusion: 热力学广延性可以从微观相互作用条件推导得出，非广延性源于长程相互作用导致的互信息不可忽略，且空间平均与非线性热力学泛函不交换，推广了欧拉关系。

title: Thermal Transport in Defective Uranium Nitride: Effects of Point Defects, Anharmonicity, and Electronic Contributions
summary: The impact of point defects on thermal transport in uranium nitride (UN) is investigated using a MLIP combined with Green-Kubo (GK) and normal mode analysis (NMA) methods over 300-1500 K. In pristine UN, temperature-dependent calculations of lattice thermal conductivity reveal that four-phonon scattering is essential yet sufficient to accurately capture high temperature anharmonic phonon transport, as evidenced by close agreement between GK and ShengBTE calculations including three- and four-phonon processes. In defective systems, all types of point defects significantly reduce thermal conductivity at low temperature. Mode-resolved analysis further shows that interstitial defects introduce new phonon states due to a stronger local strain effect. Notably, the uranium interstitial leads to strong defect-phonon scattering over broad phonon spectrum, while the other point defects produce more selective scattering, with even reduced phonon scattering for some acoustic modes. The optical contribution to thermal conductivity remains nearly constant in the presence of IU, but decreases with increasing temperature for pristine and the other defect types. The total thermal conductivity, incorporating electron-phonon coupling and an estimated electronic contribution, yields excellent agreement with experiment in the pristine system, with electronic contributions dominating thermal transport above 600 K. Moreover, with defect-electron contribution introduced through a semiclassical electron-defect scattering model, it is found that (i) the total conductivity degradation follows IU, VU, IN, and VN in descending order, and (ii) electron-phonon coupling becomes negligible in defective systems. These results provide a unified understanding of defect-dependent thermal transport in UN.

AI.tldr: 本文利用机器学习势函数（MLIP）结合Green-Kubo和简正模分析方法，研究了点缺陷对氮化铀（UN）热传输的影响。研究发现四声子散射对高温热传导至关重要；点缺陷显著降低低温热导率，铀间隙原子在宽声子谱上产生强散射，而其他缺陷选择性散射；电子贡献在600 K以上主导热传输。
AI.motivation: 理解点缺陷对UN热传输的影响机制，为核燃料设计提供理论依据。
AI.method: MLIP + Green-Kubo + 简正模分析（NMA），结合ShengBTE计算三/四声子过程，以及电子-声子耦合和半经典电子-缺陷散射模型。
AI.result: 四声子散射对高温准确描述必不可少；间隙原子引入新声子态，铀间隙造成宽谱强散射；电导率降解顺序为：IU > VU > IN > VN；缺陷系统中电子-声子耦合可忽略。
AI.conclusion: 点缺陷类型对UN热传输的影响机制不同，电子贡献在高温下主导，为缺陷工程调控核燃料热性能提供了统一理解。

title: Perturbation Theory of the Free Energy via the Mesoscopic Combined Partition Function
summary: We develop a systematic perturbation theory for the Helmholtz free energy of a classical $N$-body system within the mesoscopic framework of~\cite{OsanoMeso,OsanoExtensivity}. The combined coarse-graining operator $\mathcal{C}=\mathcal{C}_x\circ\mathcal{C}_p$ acting on single-particle phase space partitions it into product cells $C_{i,α}=V_i\timesΠ_α$ and generates a mesoscopic partition function $\mathcal{Z}_{\rm meso}(λ)$ whose reference level factorises by the multinomial theorem: $\mathcal{Z}_{\rm meso}^{(0)}=(Z_1^{(0)})^N$. Perturbation theory for $\mathcal{F}_{\rm meso}(λ)=-k_BT\ln\mathcal{Z}_{\rm meso}(λ)$ in the inter-cell perturbation $\mathcal{V}_{\rm meso}$ yields the mesoscopic Gibbs--Bogoliubov inequality and an exact coupling-parameter integration formula. The full free energy satisfies \begin{equation*} F(λ)=\mathcal{F}_{\rm meso}(λ)-k_BT\!\sum_{i<j}I(i,j;λ)+O\!\left(|Λ|\ell^{-d}e^{-2\ell/ξ}\right), \end{equation*} where the inter-cell mutual informations $I(i,j;λ)$ are the corrections identified in the extensivity analysis. The first-order theory recovers the van der Waals equation and the Barker--Henderson result; the second-order term converges to the structure-factor formula in the fine-cell limit. For long-range interactions, factorisation fails, and the mutual-information corrections quantify the resulting non-extensivity.

AI.tldr: 本文在介观框架下发展了经典N体系统亥姆霍兹自由能的微扰理论，通过粗粒化算符和多重态定理建立介观配分函数，并引入互信息修正项来处理非广延性问题，一阶理论恢复了范德瓦尔斯方程和Barker-Henderson结果，二阶项在精细格点极限下收敛到结构因子公式。
AI.motivation: 在介观框架下系统发展经典N体系统亥姆霍兹自由能的微扰理论，并处理长程相互作用导致的非广延性问题。
AI.method: 通过粗粒化算符C=C_x∘C_p将单粒子相空间分割为乘积单元C_{i,α}=V_i×Π_α，利用多重态定理得到介观配分函数的参考水平Z_meso^{(0)}=(Z_1^{(0)})^N，引入胞间微扰V_meso建立介观Gibbs-Bogoliubov不等式和耦合参数积分公式，并通过互信息I(i,j;λ)修正完整自由能。
AI.result: 一阶微扰理论恢复了范德瓦尔斯方程和Barker-Henderson结果；二阶项在精细格点极限下收敛到结构因子公式；互信息修正项量化了长程相互作用导致的非广延性。
AI.conclusion: 所发展的介观微扰理论能够统一处理短程和长程相互作用系统，互信息修正是解释非广延性的关键。

title: Anomalies in the thermal conductivity of honeycomb antiferromagnet MnPS$_{3}$
comment: 25 pages, 11 figures, to appear in PRB
summary: Intrinsic two-dimensional magnets serve as a good platform to explore collective, charge-neutral and low-energy excitations. Distinguishing the crucial role of them in experimental aspect remains a challenge for decades. Here, we study the thermal transport in honeycomb antiferromagnet MnPS$_{3}$ with $T_N$=78 K down to very low temperatures (<0.01$T_N$). At high temperatures (>0.1$T_N$), the field dependence of the thermal Hall conductivity exhibits a linear phonon Hall effect and a peak associated with the spin-flop transition due to a strong spin-lattice coupling, well reproducing the previous report (Phys. Rev. B 110, 165147 (2024)). Notably, below 2 K, we find that the field dependence of the thermal Hall conductivity exhibits sign reversals within the spin-flop phase, at which the field dependence of the longitudinal thermal conductivity also shows multiple valleys. We suggest that these anomalies are caused by the redistribution of Berry curvature in magnon bands, demonstrating the superior performance of the thermal Hall measurements to detect the Berry curvature distributions in magnetic insulators.

AI.tldr: 本研究报告了蜂窝状反铁磁体MnPS₃在极低温（<0.01T_N）下的热输运性质，发现在自旋翻转相内热霍尔电导率出现符号反转，纵横向热导率呈现多谷结构，这些异常归因于磁振子能带中贝里曲率的重新分布，表明热霍尔测量是探测磁性绝缘体中贝里曲率分布的有效手段。
AI.motivation: 长期以来，区分本征二维磁体中集体、电中性低能激发的关键作用在实验上一直是个挑战。本文旨在通过热输运研究，特别是极低温下的热霍尔效应，来揭示贝里曲率在磁性绝缘体中的分布。
AI.method: 对奈尔温度T_N=78 K的蜂窝状反铁磁体MnPS₃进行极低温（<0.01T_N）热输运测量，包括热霍尔电导率和纵向热导率的磁场依赖性研究。高温区域（>0.1T_N）的测量用于复现已有结果并进行对照。
AI.result: 高温下观察到线性声子霍尔效应和与自旋翻转转变相关的峰值，符合文献报道。而在2 K以下，发现在自旋翻转相内热霍尔电导率出现符号反转，同时纵向热导率呈现多谷结构。
AI.conclusion: 这些异常现象是由磁振子能带的贝里曲率重新分布所致，证明热霍尔测量在探测磁性绝缘体中贝里曲率分布方面具有优越性能。

title: Localization of a quantum particle in a classical one-component plasma. II. Dynamic Disorder and Temporal Decorrelation
summary: We extend the static theory of disorder-induced exponential decay of the averaged Green function of a quantum charged particle in a classical one-component plasma to the dynamic regime by incorporating the temporal evolution of the ionic density fluctuations within the random phase approximation. The dynamic potential correlator is derived from the fluctuation-dissipation theorem and the Kramers--Kronig relations. Within the eikonal (straight-line) approximation, the effective disorder strength is expressed through the dielectric function of the ion plasma. For particles moving faster than the ion thermal speed, the static Coulomb logarithm is recovered, with the large-distance cutoff replaced by the dynamic scale $v/ω_{pi}$. For slow particles, the Coulomb logarithm disappears completely and the disorder strength becomes proportional to the velocity, leading to a fundamentally different scaling of the localization length. In particular, the strong-disorder length diverges as $k^{-1/3}$ for $v\ll v_{\mathrm{th}}$, whereas it saturates in the static limit, indicating that ultra-slow particles are not exponentially localized in a dynamic plasma. A crossover between the quasi-static and dynamic regimes occurs when the particle speed becomes comparable to the ion thermal speed.

AI.tldr: 本文将静态无序诱导的平均格林函数指数衰减理论扩展到动态领域，通过随机相位近似结合离子密度涨落的时间演化，发现慢粒子在动态等离子体中不再呈指数局域化，局域长度在低速下呈k^{-1/3}发散。
AI.motivation: 经典等离子体中带电粒子的局域化问题通常采用静态无序近似，但实际等离子体中的离子密度涨落是随时间演化的，因此需要将静态理论扩展到动态领域，以更准确地描述带电粒子在动态等离子体中的输运和局域化行为。
AI.method: 基于随机相位近似(RPA)描述离子密度涨落的时间演化；从涨落-耗散定理和Kramers-Kronig关系导出动态势关联函数；采用eikonal（直线）近似，将有效无序强度通过离子等离子体的介电函数表达。
AI.result: 快粒子（v > v_th）恢复静态Coulomb对数，大距离截断由v/ω_pi替代；慢粒子Coulomb对数完全消失，无序强度与速度成正比；强无序长度在v << v_th时呈k^{-1/3}发散，而静态极限下饱和；准静态与动态之间的交叉出现在粒子速度与离子热速度可比时。
AI.conclusion: 慢粒子在动态等离子体中不会出现指数局域化，表明动态效应对带电粒子的局域化行为有根本性影响，静态理论在描述慢粒子时失效。

title: Metal-free heteroatom doping of carbon nitride for enhanced photocatalytic hydrogen peroxide production
summary: The photocatalytic production of hydrogen peroxide (H$_2$O$_2$) from water is a promising strategy for solar-to-chemical energy conversion. Herein, we investigate the effect of metal-free heteroatom doping (B, O, P, and S) on the structural, electronic, and photocatalytic properties of graphitic carbon nitride (C$_3$N$_4$) for H$_2$O$_2$ production under simulated solar irradiation. While pristine C$_3$N$_4$ exhibits stacked nanosheets, doping induces disorder, partial exfoliation, and changes in interlayer spacing, confirming successful heteroatom incorporation and modification of the electronic and optical properties. Photocatalytic experiments reveal that H$_2$O$_2$ production strongly depends on the sacrificial agent, pH, and reactive-species scavengers. All doped catalysts show enhanced activity compared to pristine C$_3$N$_4$, with 9.6-, 14.8-, 11.0-, and 16.4-fold increases for B-, P-, O-, and S-doped C$_3$N$_4$, respectively. S-doped C$_3$N$_4$ achieved the highest H$_2$O$_2$ production rate of 3022.1 $μ$mol h$^{-1}$ g$^{-1}$ and an apparent quantum yield of 8.1\%, attributed to improved charge separation and optimized selectivity. Mechanistic studies indicate that oxygen activation mainly follows a two-electron (2e$^{-}$) pathway driven by charge-carrier modulation and reactive oxygen species dynamics, with singlet oxygen and photogenerated holes playing a dominant role. In addition, S-doped C$_3$N$_4$ retained over 95\% of its activity after five cycles. These results highlight metal-free heteroatom doping as an effective strategy for sustainable photocatalytic H$_2$O$_2$ generation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了无金属杂原子掺杂（B、O、P、S）对g-C₃N₄光催化产H₂O₂性能的影响，其中S掺杂的C₃N₄性能最优，产率高达3022.1 μmol h⁻¹ g⁻¹，表观量子产率8.1%，经5次循环后仍保持95%以上活性。
AI.motivation: 光催化水生产H₂O₂是太阳能-化学能转化的有前景策略，通过无金属杂原子掺杂策略提升g-C₃N₄的光催化性能，避免使用贵金属。
AI.method: 制备了B、O、P、S掺杂的g-C₃N₄，研究其结构、电子和光催化性能；通过牺牲剂、pH、活性物种捕获实验及机理研究，揭示了两电子氧还原路径和活性氧物种动力学。
AI.result: 掺杂导致无序化、部分剥离和层间距变化；所有掺杂催化剂活性均优于纯C₃N₄，S掺杂的C₃N₄产率最高（3022.1 μmol h⁻¹ g⁻¹），AQY达8.1%，5次循环后活性保持>95%。
AI.conclusion: 无金属杂原子掺杂是提升g-C₃N₄光催化产H₂O₂的有效策略，主要通过调控电荷载流子和优化选择性实现性能提升。

title: Energy-Weighted Site Percolation in Two Dimensions
summary: We study a generalization of two-dimensional site percolation by assigning an energy cost $\varepsilon$ to bonds between nearest-neighbor occupied sites. This leads to a competition between entropy-driven cluster growth and energetic suppression (or enhancement) of connectivity. Varying $\varepsilon$ continuously interpolates between dense ferromagnetic-like clusters, ordinary classical percolation, and a dilute regime of minimally connected isolated clusters. Using Monte Carlo simulations and real-space renormalization-group (RG) methods, we show that bond energy shifts the percolation threshold smoothly. We define an energy-weighted correlation length that remains finite at the classical site occupation threshold ($p_c(\varepsilon=0)$) and shrinks with increasing $\varepsilon$, capturing the energetic suppression of large-scale connectivity. The cluster size distribution exhibits an energy-dependent cutoff that drives the transition from percolation-like clusters to isolated clusters. A real-space RG with Kadanoff block recursions reveals a systematic evolution of the correlation-length exponent $ν$ from $ν=1/2$ (dense clusters) to $ν=4/3$ (classical percolation), approaching $ν=1$ (minimally connected isolated clusters), in agreement with Coulomb-gas predictions for loop models where bond energy renormalizes loop fugacity. For large values of \(\varepsilon\) (isotropic case), the suppression of nearest-neighbor bonds results in the emergence of antiferromagnetic sub-lattice ordering at high densities. Additionally, anisotropic bond energies lead to directionally selective cluster growth. Finally, we also discuss a lattice gas RG approach and scenarios where bond energy is renormalized across different scales.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一种推广的二维格点逾渗模型，通过给近邻占据位点间的键赋予能量成本ε，探讨了熵驱动团簇生长与能量抑制/增强连通性之间的竞争。利用蒙特卡洛模拟和实空间重整化群方法，发现键能平滑地移动逾渗阈值，定义了能量加权的关联长度，并观察到临界指数ν从1/2（稠密团簇）到4/3（经典逾渗）再到1（最小连接孤立团簇）的系统演化，与环模型的Coulomb-gas预言一致。
AI.motivation: 传统二维逾渗模型仅考虑位点占据的几何随机性，忽略了近邻位点间可能存在的相互作用能量。本文旨在通过引入键能成本ε，统一描述从铁磁稠密团簇到经典逾渗再到孤立团簇的连续谱系，揭示能量对逾渗行为的影响机制。
AI.method: 采用蒙特卡洛模拟和实空间重整化群（RG）方法，其中Kadanoff Block递归用于获取临界指数演化；定义能量加权关联长度；讨论各向同性/各向异性键能情形及格气RG方法。
AI.result: 键能ε平滑地移动逾渗阈值；能量加权关联长度在经典逾渗阈值处保持有限，并随ε增大而收缩；团簇尺寸分布展现出能量依赖的截断；临界指数ν从1/2（稠密）→4/3（经典逾渗）→1（孤立团簇）系统演化；大ε下出现反铁磁子晶格有序；各向异性键能导致方向选择性团簇生长。
AI.conclusion: 键能成本提供了连接经典逾渗、铁磁团簇和孤立团簇的统一框架，RG结果与环模型的Coulomb-gas理论预测一致，表明键能可重新标度化环的活性（fugacity），揭示了能量-熵竞争驱动下的丰富临界行为。

title: Indicators for phonon hydrodynamics from first principles predictions of thermal conductivity
summary: Hydrodynamic heat flow, where out-of-equilibrium phonons collectively drift in response to an applied temperature differential, has attracted renewed interest following its experimental observation in graphite at temperatures as high as 300 K. To accelerate discovery of material alternatives to graphite and suitable experimental conditions for realizing this non-Fourier heat flow regime, computationally efficient indicators derived from predictive first principles approaches are necessary. Here we show that the ratio of thermal conductivity ($κ$) obtained from the complete solution of the linearized Peierls-Boltzmann equation (LPBE) for phonon transport ($κ_{LPBE}$), to that from the relaxation time approximation (RTA) for phonon decay ($κ_{RTA}$), is a low cost indicator for phonon hydrodynamics. We show that collectively drifting non-equilibrium phonons amplify the ratio of $κ_{LPBE}$ to $κ_{RTA}$, while a small $κ_{LPBE}/κ_{RTA}$ correlates with predominantly diffusive phonon transport. On the other hand, we find that conventional approaches that rely only on momentum-conserving Normal and momentum-dissipating Umklapp scattering rates, such as the RTA and the Callaway approximations to the LPBE, are inadequate to predict phonon hydrodynamics. Furthermore, our study reveals that the indicator ratio - $κ_{LPBE}/κ_{RTA}$, and therefore the strength of hydrodynamic signatures, decrease with increasing Brillouin zone (BZ) sampling density for several ultrahigh-$κ$ materials at low temperatures, thus underscoring the need for careful BZ sampling convergence studies to ensure robust predictions of phonon hydrodynamics. This computationally inexpensive indicator of phonon hydrodynamics will accelerate the search for new materials that exhibit such unconventional heat flow regimes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出，完全求解线性化Peierls-Boltzmann方程得到的热导率（κLPBE）与弛豫时间近似得到的热导率（κRTA）之比，可作为声子水动力学行为的低成本指示器，该比值越大表明声子集体漂移越显著，且发现该比值会随布里渊区采样密度增加而下降，需谨慎进行收敛性研究。
AI.motivation: 为了加速发现除石墨外其他能实现声子水动力学行为（非傅里叶热流）的材料及合适的实验条件，需要基于第一性原理的计算高效指示器。
AI.method: 通过对比完全求解线性化Peierls-Boltzmann方程（LPBE）与弛豫时间近似（RTA）得到的热导率比值（κLPBE/κRTA），并将其作为声子水动力学行为的指示器。同时分析了布里渊区采样密度对该比值的影响。
AI.result: κLPBE/κRTA越大，声子集体漂移越强，水动力学行为越显著；反之则对应扩散输运。传统依赖于Normal和Umklapp散射率的RTA及Callaway近似不足以预测声子水动力学。该比值随布里渊区采样密度增加而下降，需注意收敛性。
AI.conclusion: κLPBE/κRTA是一个计算成本低廉的声子水动力学指示器，有助于加速发现展现非傅里叶热流的新材料。

title: Ordering, correlation functions and phase transitions in molecular systems
summary: Although the classical density functional theory (DFT) of inhomogeneous fluids was formulated more than four decades ago, its application to broken symmetry phases of molecular systems remained a challenge. Approximate free energy functionals proposed in the past failed to give accurate description of relative stability of phases, phase transitions, and of properties arising due to broken symmetry. In a DFT pair correlation functions (PCFs) play a fundamental role. While in the case of homogeneous fluids, PCFs are routinely determined using experimental, theoretical or simulation methods, determination of PCFs of broken symmetry phases remained a problem. Breaking of symmetry at the transition point gives rise a new contribution to correlation functions which may differ significantly from that of the coexisting higher symmetry phase. We review methods which have been developed in the last few years to calculate PCFs of broken symmetry phases and their inclusion in the expressions of the grand potential and the intrinsic free-energy. This leads to formulation of an exact DFT. We describe application of the theory to freezing of variety of fluids into ordered phases and transition from an ordered phase of higher symmetry to a phase of lower symmetry. Comparison of results found from different versions of DFT and simulations reveal their accuracy. A brief description of basics of statistical mechanics is included to make the article self-contained.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了近年来发展的用于计算破缺对称相（如有序相）的成对关联函数（PCFs）的方法，并将其纳入巨势和本征自由能表达式中，从而构建了精确的经典密度泛函理论（DFT）。该理论成功应用于多种流体的凝固过程及对称性逐渐降低的相变问题，并通过与模拟结果对比验证了其准确性。
AI.motivation: 经典DFT已提出四十余年，但应用于分子系统的破缺对称相（如有序相）一直存在挑战。以往的自由能泛函无法准确描述相的相对稳定性、相变以及破缺对称引起的性质，且破缺对称相的PCFs难以确定。因此，需要发展新的方法来计算这些PCFs并构建精确的DFT。
AI.method: 综述了近几年前发展的方法，用于计算破缺对称相的PCFs，并将这些PCFs纳入巨势和本征自由能的表达式中，从而构建精确的DFT。文章还包含了统计力学基础的简要介绍以保证自洽性。
AI.result: 该理论成功应用于多种流体向有序相的凝固过程，以及从高对称性有序相向低对称性有序相的转变。通过比较不同DFT版本与模拟结果，验证了该方法的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 通过将破缺对称相的PCFs纳入DFT框架，可以构建精确的理论，有效描述有序相的形成和相变。该方法有望成为研究复杂相变问题的有力工具。

title: Real-time Multi-instrument Autonomous Discovery of Novel Phase-change Memory Materials
summary: Autonomous labs enable the integration of automated experiment execution, data analysis and decision making. The main challenge remains the integration of diverse data streams from multiple instruments, where the data is often heterogeneous and unsynchronized. The standard learning process of undetermined synthesis-process-structure-property relationships (SPSPR) usually relies on post-experiment analysis after data is fully collected, not during live experiments, and decision making is carried out independently across characterization equipment. Here, we demonstrate the Multi-instrument Autonomous Discovery (MAD) framework -- combining structural property mapping and functional property optimization simultaneously in a closed-loop manner. As an example, we applied MAD to phase change memory (PCM) materials, and, in particular on the Mn-Sb-Te ternary, a previously unexplored materials system for PCM. A multi-output model is employed to merge data from x-ray diffraction (XRD) and electrical resistance measurements simultaneously through a co-regionalization kernel that models the relationship between them. The output probabilistic posterior and uncertainty quantification facilitate decision making with shared knowledge, while the goals are different across tasks. We aimed to maximize the knowledge of crystal structure distribution using non-negative matrix factorization (NMF), while in parallel, we find the composition with the maximum resistance value, an important figure of merit for PCM. Leveraging MAD, we found promising electrical PCMs and identified the SPSPR within 25 closed-loop iterations, corresponding to a seven-fold speed-up. The framework opens a new path of study in large-scale autonomous facilities, where future experiments can be run in parallel together, not independently.

AI.tldr: 提出多仪器自主发现（MAD）框架，通过多输出模型协同处理X射线衍射和电阻测量数据，在闭环实验中同时完成结构图谱映射与功能性能优化，以Mn-Sb-Te相变存储材料为例，25次迭代实现7倍加速。
AI.motivation: 现有自主实验室面临多仪器数据异构、不同步的集成难题，且决策通常依赖事后分析而非实时实验，不同表征设备的决策相互独立，无法实现协同优化。
AI.method: 提出MAD框架，采用多输出模型（协区域化核）融合XRD和电阻数据，利用非负矩阵分解（NMF）最大化晶体结构分布知识，同时优化电阻值目标，通过不确定性量化实现跨任务的共享知识决策。
AI.result: 在Mn-Sb-Te三元体系中，25次闭环迭代内发现有前景的相变存储材料并确定合成-工艺-结构-性能关系，实现7倍加速。
AI.conclusion: MAD框架实现了多仪器并行协同实验，为大型自主设施中未来实验的并行运行开辟了新路径。

title: Localization of a quantum particle in a classical one-component plasma.III. Mutual coherence and coherence degradation in Coulomb-disordered media
summary: We derive the mutual coherence function of an electron beam propagating through a static or dynamic Coulomb-disordered medium and show that its decay introduces an intrinsic coherence-reduction mechanism relevant for electron microscopy in Coulomb-disordered media. Using the Efimov path-integral formalism, the coherence length $ρ_c$ is expressed through the same disorder correlator that governs the single-particle localization length $\ell$. For both a static electrolyte and a dynamic plasma we obtain a universal relation $ρ_c \sim λ_D \sqrt{\ell/L}$, where $λ_D$ is the Debye length and $L$ the sample thickness. In the static case $\ell\propto k^{2}$ (electron momentum), whereas in the dynamic slow-particle regime $\ell\propto k$, leading to qualitatively different energy dependences of the coherence scale. The ion thermal velocity cancels out in the final expression, demonstrating a formal connection between transverse coherence decay and longitudinal localization phenomena. Exact analytical results are given for the phase structure function of a model electrolyte, and numerical estimates indicate that disorder-induced phase decorrelation may contribute appreciably to the attenuation of high-spatial-frequency contrast under experimentally relevant liquid-cell electron microscopy conditions. Possible implications for cryo-EM, disordered liquids, soft condensed matter, and biological media are discussed. In an appendix we extend the theory to the relativistic regime relevant for transmission electron microscopy.

AI.tldr: 本文利用Efimov路径积分形式，推导了电子束在库仑无序介质中传播的互相干函数，建立了横向相干长度与局域化长度之间的普适关系，并揭示了动态与静态无序介质中不同的能量依赖行为。
AI.motivation: 电子显微镜在液态电池、冷冻电镜等含库仑无序介质环境中成像时，样品中的无序分布会导致电子束的相干性退化，影响高空间频率对比度。现有理论对此类环境中的相干性损失机制缺乏系统理解。
AI.method: 采用Efimov路径积分形式，将相干长度ρ_c通过无序关联函数与单粒子局域化长度ℓ联系起来；分别针对静态电解质和动态等离子体两种情形推导解析关系；并利用Debye屏蔽长度λ_D和样品厚度L建立普适关系ρ_c ~ λ_D √(ℓ/L)。
AI.result: 静态无序中ℓ∝k²（电子动量平方），动态慢粒子区ℓ∝k，两者能量依赖定性不同；离子热速度在最终表达式中抵消；给出了模型电解质的相位结构函数精确解析结果；数值估计表明无序诱导的相位退相干在液态电池电镜实验条件下对高空间频率对比度衰减有显著贡献。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了横向相干性衰减与纵向局域化现象之间的形式联系，为理解电子显微镜在库仑无序介质中的成像极限提供了理论框架，并对冷冻电镜、无序液体、软凝聚态及生物介质等应用场景具有潜在指导意义。

title: Chemo-mechanical coupling stabilizes mixed $\mathrm{Ag}_{x}\mathrm{Cu}_{1-x}\mathrm{GaSe}_{2}$ solar-cell absorbers: Insights from Monte-Carlo simulations assisted by ab initio informed machine-learning potentials
summary: Alloying Ag into Cu(In,Ga)Se$_2$ has enabled record solar-cell efficiencies ($\sim23.6\%$), yet their long-term stability remains in question because initio calculations predict a Ag-Cu miscibility gap near ambient temperature. By off-lattice Monte-Carlo simulations using a newly developed machine learning (ML) interatomic potential we show that the presence of coherency strain is resolving the controversy between experimental observations and the predicted phase stability. Incorporating elastic energy contributions present in a coherent setup results in complete Ag-Cu miscibility, whereas the expected phase separation occurs in the absence of coherency strains with respect to the end boundary phases, which are mimicked by an incoherent interface with misfit dislocations. The developed ML-MC framework provides a novel approach for resolving discrepancies in thermodynamic stability for systems where mechanical and chemical effects compete.

AI.tldr: 通过机器学习势的蒙特卡洛模拟发现，共格应变使Ag-Cu在CIGS中完全互溶，解决了实验与理论计算之间关于相稳定性的争议。
AI.motivation: 实验观察到Ag掺入CIGS可实现高效太阳能电池，但第一性原理计算预测存在Ag-Cu混溶隙，理论与实验存在矛盾，因此需要澄清该体系在环境温度下的真实相稳定性。
AI.method: 开发机器学习（ML）原子间势，结合离格点蒙特卡洛（off-lattice Monte Carlo）模拟，分别考虑共格应变和非共格（含失配位错）界面两种情况，研究Ag-Cu在CIGS中的混溶性。
AI.result: 在共格应变的条件下，Ag-Cu完全互溶；而在无共格应变、模拟非共格界面的条件下，出现预期的相分离。共格应变抑制了相分离，解释了实验观测。
AI.conclusion: 该ML-MC框架为处理力学与化学效应竞争的热力学稳定性问题提供了新方法，也支撑了Ag合金化CIGS太阳能电池的长程稳定性。

title: Combinatorial Survey of Structural Phase Distribution and Magnetism in Fe-Ge-Te Composition-spread Thin Film Libraries
summary: Recently, magnetic 2-dimensional (2D) van der Waals (vdW) materials have garnered tremendous attention. The vdW ferromagnet Fe5Ge1Te2 has a Curie temperature Tc of ~ 270 K, which is tailorable by tuning the stoichiometry and the Fe deficiency to reach room temperature. To explore the expanded compositional space, we implemented combinatorial synthesis and high-throughput characterization to investigate the structural phase distribution and ferromagnetism of a Fe-Ge-Te thin film library. The library was prepared by magnetron co-sputtering followed by annealing in vacuum or in an inert environment. Composition and structural phase distribution of the 177 pads in the library were characterized using high-throughput wavelength dispersive spectroscopy (WDS), X-ray diffraction (XRD), and two-point probe resistance measurements. We leverage unsupervised machine learning to cluster the XRD dataset into groups of compositions with similar structural phases, and further study the ferromagnetic properties via SQUID magnetometry and X-ray magnetic circular dichroism (XMCD) across different clusters. The results are compared against magnetization and structural models calculated using DFT. Our results demonstrate that the hexagonal crystal structure is a critical prerequisite for ferromagnetism in this system, and that unexplored materials adopting this structure can be efficiently identified as possible ferromagnetic materials using our high-throughput, ML-assisted framework. This workflow based on the combinatorial strategy allows us to rapidly capture the composition-structure-magnetic property map across a broad compositional landscape of novel magnetic materials.

AI.tldr: 本文通过组合合成与高通量表征方法，结合无监督机器学习，系统研究了Fe-Ge-Te薄膜库的组成-结构-磁性关系，发现六方晶体结构是该体系中铁磁性的关键前提，并验证了ML辅助高通量框架可高效筛选新型铁磁材料。
AI.motivation: Fe5Ge1Te2作为二维vdW铁磁体具有接近室温的居里温度（~270 K），通过调整化学计量比和Fe缺陷可达室温。为探索更广泛的组分空间并快速发现新型铁磁材料，需要建立高效的组成-结构-磁性映射方法。
AI.method: 采用磁控共溅射结合退火制备Fe-Ge-Te薄膜库（177个焊盘）；使用高通量WDS、XRD和两点探针电阻测量进行表征；利用无监督机器学习对XRD数据聚类分组；通过SQUID和XMCD研究不同聚类组的铁磁性质；结合DFT计算进行对比验证。
AI.result: 六方晶体结构是该体系中铁磁性的关键前提条件；ML辅助高通量框架可高效识别具有该结构的新型铁磁候选材料；成功建立了组成-结构-磁性的快速映射图谱。
AI.conclusion: 基于组合策略的ML辅助高通量工作流能够快速捕获宽组分空间中新型磁性材料的组成-结构-磁性关系，为加速发现新型二维铁磁材料提供了有效范式。

title: Characterisation of fire-damaged batteries,implications for recycling
summary: As lithium-ion battery demand grows, so do fire safety challenges. Despite this, research on fire-damaged batteries remains limited. This study explores the distribution of valuable metals (such as Ni, Mn, Co, Cu) in two types of waste derived from lithium-ion nickel-manganese-cobalt oxide batteries (NMC811), black mass (BM) and fire-damaged waste (FD). It emphasizes that cobalt, manganese, and nickel-rich NMC811 particles are predominantly found in smaller particle size fractions (<125 microns), where they can account for up to 85 percent of total metal content. Fire-damaged (FD) batteries show a similar, though less pronounced, trend. Evidence of structural degradation suggests that fire temperatures exceeded 500°C; however, the presence of residual organic binders indicates that heat was unevenly distributed during the fire. FD batteries become friable and easily fragment into fine particles, which can hinder the effective separation of copper and aluminium current collectors, increasing their presence in processed material. The inclusion of FD batteries in standard BM processing introduces variability in output composition, potentially lowering the concentration of high-value NMC811 materials present. To maintain product quality and recycling output values, it is recommended that FD batteries are processed separately. Alternatively, particle size separation may allow for tailored outputs aligned with specific customer requirements.

AI.tldr: 本文研究火灾受损锂离子电池（NMC811）与黑粉（BM）中关键金属的分布特性，发现NMC811颗粒主要富集于<125微米细颗粒中（含量高达85%），火灾导致电池脆化、铜铝污染增加，建议将火灾受损电池单独处理或采用粒径分级以优化回收品质。
AI.motivation: 随着锂离子电池需求激增，火灾安全问题日益突出，但关于火灾受损电池的回收研究却十分有限，因此有必要探索火灾对电池材料分布和回收过程的影响。
AI.method: 对比分析两种废弃物——黑粉（BM）和火灾受损废弃物（FD）——中Ni、Mn、Co、Cu等有价金属的分布规律，通过颗粒粒径分级、成分分析及结构表征等手段进行研究。
AI.result: NMC811颗粒主要集中在<125微米粒径段，占金属总量高达85%；火灾受损电池呈现类似但较弱的趋势。火灾温度超过500°C导致结构降解，但残余有机粘合剂表明热量分布不均。火灾受损电池易碎，铜铝集流体污染增加。
AI.conclusion: 建议将火灾受损电池与标准黑粉分开处理，或采用粒径分级技术，以维持产品品质和回收产出价值。

title: High-Density Horizontal Arrays of Single-Chirality Carbon Nanotubes
summary: Highly ordered high-density arrays of single-chirality single-walled carbon nanotubes (SWCNTs) are greatly desired for exploring the intrinsic anisotropic properties and collective performance of such 1-dimensional (1D) nanomaterials. Here we present a Marangoni flow-induced self-assembly (MISA) strategy to fabricate monolayered SWCNT arrays achieving a packing density of ~200 ${μm}^{-1}$ and a 2-dimensional order parameter ($S_{2\mathrm{D}}$) of ~0.95. Relying on its general compatibility with both organic and aqueous dispersions, we prepare single-chirality and enantiomer-pure SWCNT arrays from organic and aqueous dispersions resulting from the sorting processes. The anisotropic optical and electrical properties of the arrays are demonstrated by the polarization-dependent Rabi splitting as well as polarized near-infrared light emission and detection. With the great tolerance to solutions, substrates, and materials, as well as the feasibility and controllability, MISA shows great potential in the assembly of 1D nanomaterials.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种Marangoni流诱导自组装（MISA）策略，成功制备了高密度、单 chirality 的单壁碳纳米管阵列，实现了约200 ${μm}^{-1}$的堆积密度和~0.95的二维有序度参数，并展示了其各向异性光学和电学性能。
AI.motivation: 高密度、单 chirality 的单壁碳纳米管（SWCNT）阵列对于探索其一维纳米材料的本征各向异性性质和集体性能至关重要，但目前制备方法存在挑战。
AI.method: 采用Marangoni流诱导自组装（MISA）策略，兼容有机和水相分散体系，通过分选过程制备单 chirality 和对映体纯的SWCNT阵列。
AI.result: 实现了~200 ${μm}^{-1}$的堆积密度和~0.95的二维有序度参数（$S_{2\mathrm{D}}$），并展示了极化依赖的Rabi分裂以及偏振近红外光发射和检测的各向异性光学与电学性能。
AI.conclusion: MISA策略对溶液、基底和材料具有高度耐受性，兼具可行性和可控性，在一维纳米材料组装领域具有巨大潜力。

title: First-principles investigation of small polarons in rhombohedral NaNbO$_{3}$
summary: Sodium niobate (NaNbO$_{3}$) is a perovskite oxide and a key component of emerging lead-free antiferroelectric capacitors for high-energy-density applications. However, its performance can be hindered by irreversible phase transitions and leakage currents associated with low electrical resistivity. Defect and doping engineering offers a potential way to overcome these problems, but its use requires a detailed understanding of electronic, ionic, and polaron charge-compensation mechanisms, where the role of polarons remains largely unexplored. Here, we investigate the stability of small hole and electron polarons in rhombohedral NaNbO$_{3}$, which is a structurally well-defined model system that avoids lattice-dynamical instabilities. Trapping energies are calculated using density-functional theory corrected by a Hubbard $U$, using the enforced-piecewise-linearity approach including finite-size scaling. For the small hole-polaron centered on O-2$p$ orbital, we find a trapping energy of $-$0.65 (eV) and an adiabatic migration barrier of 0.32 (eV) determined by nudged-elastic-band calculations. In contrast, we show that excess electrons do not self-trap on Nb-4$d$ orbitals, reflecting weak electron-phonon coupling in the conduction band manifold. These results identify oxygen as an intrinsic hole trap in NaNbO$_{3}$ and highlight the importance of including hole polarons in defect models of NaNbO$_{3}$-based electroceramics.

AI.tldr: 本文通过DFT+U计算，首次揭示了菱方相NaNbO₃中氧空穴极化子的稳定存在（捕获能-0.65 eV，迁移势垒0.32 eV），而电子不会自陷，表明氧是NaNbO₃中的本征空穴陷阱，对理解该材料的缺陷补偿机制和优化高能量密度电容器性能具有重要意义。
AI.motivation: NaNbO₃是下一代无铅反铁电电容器的关键材料，但存在不可逆相变和漏电流问题。缺陷与掺杂工程有望解决这些问题，但需要深入理解电子、离子和极化子电荷补偿机制，其中极化子的作用尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 采用Hubbard U修正的密度泛函理论（DFT+U），结合强制分段线性方法和有限尺寸标度，计算小极化子的捕获能；使用微动弹性带方法计算绝热迁移势垒。
AI.result: O-2p轨道上的小空穴极化子捕获能为-0.65 eV，绝热迁移势垒为0.32 eV；而Nb-4d轨道上的过剩电子不会发生自陷，表明导带中电子-声子耦合较弱。
AI.conclusion: 氧是NaNbO₃中本征的空穴陷阱，在缺陷模型中必须考虑空穴极化子的贡献，这对理解NaNbO₃基电陶瓷的电荷补偿机制具有重要指导意义。

title: Short-range order in the CoCrFeMnNi high-entropy alloy from cluster expansion
summary: We investigate the short-range order (SRO) and phase stability of the equiatomic CoCrFeMnNi high-entropy alloy using cluster expansion supplemented by an eigen-decomposition analysis of the SRO parameters. Our results reveal that the primary ordering behavior is determined by strong Cr-Cr repulsive interactions, complemented by attractive heteroatomic Cr-$X$ pairs in the first nearest-neighbor shell. This chemical affinity is consistent with the emergence of ordered local environments and appears to be a major contributor to the primary order-disorder transition. At lower temperatures, the spectral SRO analysis suggests two additional lower-temperature instabilities: a collective ordering instability and an Fe-rich local clustering instability.

AI.tldr: 本文通过团簇展开和特征分解分析，研究了等原子CoCrFeMnNi高熵合金的短程有序和相稳定性，发现Cr-Cr排斥和Cr-X吸引主导了有序行为，并揭示了低温下的两种额外不稳定性。
AI.motivation: 理解高熵合金中短程有序的起源及其对相稳定性的影响，特别是Cr元素在有序化过程中的关键作用。
AI.method: 采用团簇展开方法，并结合短程有序参数的特征分解分析，系统研究各原子对间的相互作用。
AI.result: 发现了Cr-Cr强排斥与Cr-X（X=Co,Fe,Mn,Ni）吸引的竞争关系是短程有序的主要驱动力；低温下识别出集体有序化不稳定性与富Fe局域团簇不稳定性两种新现象。
AI.conclusion: Cr元素的化学亲和性是CoCrFeMnNi合金中主要有序-无序转变的关键因素，同时低温下存在两种不同类型的相不稳定性机制。

title: Why hole polaron formation on oxygen is limiting the Fermi level in Fe acceptor doped BaTiO$_{3}$ under oxidizing conditions
summary: Oxidizing Fe-doped BaTiO$_3$ is commonly expected to convert substitutional Fe$^{3+}$ acceptors into formal Fe$^{4+}$ centers. Yet, the experimentally accessible picture based on electron-paramagnetic resonance (EPR) is dominated by Fe$^{3+}$-related signatures, while Fe$^{4+}$ is not a straightforward observable. Here we show that this apparent discrepancy reflects the preferred location of the oxidizing hole: not on Fe, but on oxygen. Using density-functional theory with with occupation-matrix control and a piecewise-linearity-based Hubbard correction (DFT+$U$) for O-2$p$ states, we find that an oxygen-centered hole polaron is forming a Fe$^{3+}$-O$^{-}$ complex that is lower in energy than the formal Fe$^{4+}$ configuration. Our results identify ligand-hole formation as a favorable charge-compensation mechanism in oxidized Fe-doped BaTiO$_3$ and provide an explanation for the predominance of Fe$^{3+}$-based centers in spectroscopy. More broadly, they show how oxygen polarons can limit Fermi-level shifts and control the electronic response of acceptor-doped ferroelectric perovskites.

AI.tldr: 本文通过DFT+U计算发现，氧化Fe掺杂BaTiO₃时，空穴更倾向于占据氧位形成Fe³⁺-O⁻复合体，而非形成Fe⁴⁺，解释了EPR实验中主要观察到Fe³⁺信号的现象。
AI.motivation: 实验上氧化Fe掺杂BaTiO₃预期产生Fe⁴⁺，但EPR主要观察到Fe³⁺信号，Fe⁴⁺难以直接观测，这一矛盾尚未得到合理解释。
AI.method: 采用占位矩阵控制与基于分段线性修正的Hubbard修正（DFT+U）方法，对O-2p态进行精确描述，计算氧化过程中空穴的优先占位位置。
AI.result: 氧中心空穴极化子形成的Fe³⁺-O⁻复合体能量低于形式上的Fe⁴⁺构型，即空穴更倾向位于氧而非铁上。
AI.conclusion: 配体空穴形成是氧化Fe掺杂BaTiO₃中有利的电荷补偿机制，解释了Fe³⁺信号占主导的实验现象，并表明氧极化子可限制费米能级移动、控制受主掺杂铁电钙钛矿的电子响应。

title: Tuning the Charge Transfer of Transition Metal Dichalcogenides via Misfit Layer Compounds
summary: Misfit layer compounds (MLCs) are a versatile platform for exploring the electronic phase diagram of two dimensional (2D) materials beyond the limits of conventional gating techniques. This work demonstrates the precise tunability of electron doping in NbSe2 monolayers through chemical alloying within the rocksalt layer of (LaxPb1xSe)1.14(NbSe2)2 heterostructures. By combining first principles density functional theory (DFT) calculations with angle resolved photoemission spectroscopy (ARPES), we prove that the rocksalt unit acts as an universal electron donor. We show that varying the La Pb ratio results in a rigid Fermi level shift, still preserving the NbSe2 electronic structure. Crucially, photon energy dependent ARPES confirms that the NbSe2 layers nearly maintain their intrinsic 2D character and orbital identity within the three dimensional misfit. This study establishes MLCs as a reliable platform for engineering emergent states in 2D transition metal dichalcogenides through precise stoichiometric control.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了通过化学合金化调控(La_xPb₁₋ₓSe)₁.₁₄(NbSe₂)₂异质结构中岩盐层的La/Pb比例，可以实现对NbSe₂单层的精确电子掺杂，且保持其二维电子结构和轨道特性不变，确立了错配层化合物作为精确调控二维材料电子相图的可靠平台。
AI.motivation: 探索超越传统门控技术限制的二维材料电子相图调控方法，寻找一种更可靠、可精确调谐的掺杂手段。
AI.method: 结合第一性原理DFT计算与角分辨光电子能谱(ARPES)实验，通过化学合金化改变(La_xPb₁₋ₓSe)岩盐层中La/Pb比例，系统研究对NbSe₂单层电子结构的影响。
AI.result: 岩盐单元作为通用电子供体，改变La/Pb比例可刚性地移动费米能级，且在三维错配结构中NbSe₂层保持准二维特征和轨道特性。
AI.conclusion: 错配层化合物(MLCs)是通过精确化学计量控制来工程化二维过渡金属硫族化物中新兴量子态的理想平台。

title: Metastable Cu$_{1-x}$CrTe$_2$ -- Completing the copper chromium delafossite series through soft chemistry
summary: In the layered copper chromium dichalcogenide series CuCr$X_2$, the oxide, the sulfide, and the selenide analogues have been reported, but the telluride CuCrTe$_2$ has remained unsynthesized so far. Here, we report the synthesis of Cu$_{1-x}$CrTe$_2$ ($x \approx 0.3$), which forms only within a narrow temperature window near 90 °C by solvothermal cation exchange of K$_{1-x}$CrTe$_2$ ($x \approx 0.3$) and CuBr. Cu$_{1-x}$CrTe$_2$ undergoes a magnetostructural transition to an antiferromagnetic state at $T_\mathrm{N}=239$ K, a Néel temperature that is high relative to other $A$CrTe$_2$ phases and comparable to that of ferromagnetic, fully-deintercalated CrTe$_2$. Cu$_{1-x}$CrTe$_2$ is metastable and decomposes at temperatures as low as 250 °C to form spinel CuCr$_2$Te$_4$. These results highlight the importance of low-temperature topochemical routes for accessing metastable Cu(I)-containing tellurides that are inaccessible by conventional solid-state synthesis.

AI.tldr: 本文首次通过低温溶剂热阳离子交换法合成了层状铜铬碲化物Cu$_{1-x}$CrTe$_2$（$x\approx0.3$），发现其在239 K发生磁结构相变进入反铁磁态，且因亚稳态在250°C即分解为尖晶石相CuCr$_2$Te$_4$，凸显了低温拓扑化学路线对合成亚稳态Cu(I)碲化物的关键作用。
AI.motivation: 在层状铜铬二硫族化合物CuCr$X_2$系列中，氧化物、硫化物和硒化物已被报道，但碲化物CuCrTe$_2$一直未被合成；因此，作者旨在填补这一空白，探索该碲化物的合成可行性及其物理性质。
AI.method: 采用溶剂热阳离子交换法，在约90°C的狭窄温度窗口内，以K$_{1-x}$CrTe$_2$（$x\approx0.3$）和CuBr为前驱体进行反应，合成目标化合物。
AI.result: 成功合成了Cu$_{1-x}$CrTe$_2$（$x\approx0.3$），其在$T_\mathrm{N}=239$ K发生磁结构相变进入反铁磁态（该奈尔温度高于其他$A$CrTe$_2$相，与铁磁完全脱嵌的CrTe$_2$相当）；该化合物在低至250°C即分解为尖晶石CuCr$_2$Te$_4$。
AI.conclusion: 低温拓扑化学路线是获取常规固相合成无法得到的亚稳态Cu(I)碲化物的有效策略。

title: Epitaxial growth and magnetic phase transitions in non-centrosymmetric EuPdSi$_3$ thin films
